faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get admission at Medvarsity?
faqs.answer: Medvarsity offers direct admission. The eligibility criteria can vary depending on the programme chosen by the student. Aspiring candidates must complete their medical or dental degree, postgraduate degree or equivalent degree, and must be registered with a relevant medical council. Medvarsity programmes are designed for medical professionals who are seeking to enhance their knowledge and skills in a particular field.

faqs.question: What is Medvarsity famous for?
faqs.answer: Medvarsity is renowned for providing advanced online medical education and training to healthcare professionals. It offers a diverse array of courses across various specialties like - such as cardiology, pediatrics, diabetes management, etc., designed to enhance clinical practice and foster career advancement. Medvarsity is distinguished for its interactive learning modules that include case studies and practical simulations.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good teachers, location and placements. But lacking in some ground.

review_content.Placements: Although I am currently enrolled in the MBBS course of the college, the placement percentage, as I am aware, is quite high and satisfactory. A junior resident working in a government hospital can earn anywhere between 30k-60k, depending on factors like the state/UT, the hospital, etc. Private hospitals may even more. Internship is mandatory and everyone get to do it in under any medical college in the state.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at ASCOMS is not upto mark, as compared to other privately funded medical colleges in India, not a blame though because the fee is also less as compared to those. Wi-Fi is available in places like hotel, library etc. The labs of some departments are outdated, but in subjects like pharmacology, it is well maintained. Classrooms are probably not the best part of the college, most of which require an upgrade, it is only since a years back that they have starting to incorporate projectors, etc. Hostels are the worse part. Unlit corridors, not-so-clean washrooms and mess has very limited number of dishes with not that good of a quality. Although that is the case with boys' hostel, girls' hostels are a bit better. There is a sports week once a year, and that's it.

review_summary.college_name: Acharya Shri Chander College of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Talking about placements, the college is satisfactory but the infrastructure needs to be updated.

content.Placements: ASCOMS is a private medical college. Although the counselling is done by JKBOPEE. There are 100 total seats. Around 10 seats are reserved for NRI and 25 for P&B. The PG selection ratio is good owing to the less patient flow, so the interns get more time to prepare for PG entrance. The fee for OM students is Rs. 5,69,000 per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure needs to be upgraded. Our college is upgrading it. They have installed the latest quality panel and stuff, but still, there is a lot of work to do. One pick point is that they need to install air conditioners everywhere which are not in place now.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because it was a great experience that I will never forget.

content.Placements: Almost 10% of students got placed. Almost 95% of students did their internships in ASCOMS, and the rest by reference in Srinagar or other locations. Students didn't get a stipend during the 1-year internship.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. Good labs, and clean and air-conditioned classrooms are available. There is a sports section in college, and various activities are conducted during the sports week. On regular days, you can play different sports. I was a local student, so I didn't enroll in the hostel facility, but I heard from my friends that it is average. Food is like in any other hostel, tasteless.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good teachers, location and placements. But lacking in some ground.

content.Placements: Although I am currently enrolled in the MBBS course of the college, the placement percentage, as I am aware, is quite high and satisfactory. A junior resident working in a government hospital can earn anywhere between 30k-60k, depending on factors like the state/UT, the hospital, etc. Private hospitals may even more. Internship is mandatory and everyone get to do it in under any medical college in the state.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at ASCOMS is not upto mark, as compared to other privately funded medical colleges in India, not a blame though because the fee is also less as compared to those. Wi-Fi is available in places like hotel, library etc. The labs of some departments are outdated, but in subjects like pharmacology, it is well maintained. Classrooms are probably not the best part of the college, most of which require an upgrade, it is only since a years back that they have starting to incorporate projectors, etc. Hostels are the worse part. Unlit corridors, not-so-clean washrooms and mess has very limited number of dishes with not that good of a quality. Although that is the case with boys' hostel, girls' hostels are a bit better. There is a sports week once a year, and that's it.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely sattisfied with college,placements are 100 percent,value of money is also good

content.Placements: 100% placement Lowest package 64 k Highest pack 125 k Govt hospitals in delhi,mumbai,chandigarh and other metropolitian cities 100% students get paid internships as it is compulsory Medical officer is the top role offered after you are done with MBBS and the intership
content.Infrastructure: Library acess from 9Am to 9pm Wifi available in campus Classrooms are decwnt Labs are also decent Facilities in hostel are just okay okay Quality of food in mess is not that good in boys hostel Canteens have good quality of food Medical facilities are topclass as it is a medical college Sports and games are given good attention by the managing bodies and are also being played by students at competitive level

individual_reviews.course: MD in Anaesthesiology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good teachers and placements but the infrastructure is not good.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in our batch. Many students cracked NEET and PG. Remaining students opted for posts of medical officers. Internships are also offered in this course. The stipend is Rs.12,300 per month. No top recruiting companies visit our college for recruitment. After MBBS students opt for exams like NEET, PG, INI, CET, medical office exams, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are well-maintained. It also provides a decent library. There are 3 libraries in our college. The light system is not good in our classrooms. Hostels are very good. Mess is average. Classrooms are also not air-conditioned. Canteen is also available. Playground is good. It also has a basketball court.

college_info.college_name: Uttarakhand Ayurved University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

college_info.intro: Uttarakhand Ayurved University popular programmes are B.A.M.S and BHMS. UAU Dehradun students are placed in top companies at top positions. The BHMS students will learn fundamental principles of Homoeopathy and will also learn about Applied Anatomy. The basic aim of providing education and training in a Homoeopathic institution is to prepare a competent Homoeopathic Physician who is very much capable of functioning effectively and independently under the Rural and Urban setups. Overall, it's one of the top universities offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the Uttarakhand Ayurved University courses and their respective eligibility and Uttarakhand Ayurved University fee:

review_content.General: College has well-developed and well-furnished infrastructure and facilities are available. DIMS has fully furnished smart classrooms with all the advanced technology and well-equipped labs that help students with effective learning. A 24-hour Wi-Fi is available and the library has all books. Hostel rooms are fully furnished with double or triple seating arrangements, beds, almirahs, study tables, and chairs. Mess food is good in taste and hygiene in the mess is well-maintained. Many facilities are available in the hostel such as Wi-Fi, laundry, and a gym. Sports facilities are also available such as carrom, football, volleyball, badminton, and table tennis.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Study is far better than any other colleges in Haridwar district.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 80% of students got placed from our college after completion of their post-graduation. You can do your practice in Ayurveda, or you can open your own Ayurveda hospital, or you can become a professor in your field. After your PG, you can get an average package of 8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is good, with a small playground. The college is working hard to improve the campus as much as possible. Hostels are good. Rooms are well-furnished, with attached washrooms. Mess food is average. However, all mess food is average anywhere you go. Sports and events are less of a priority at this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I wouldn't recommend this college to anyone.

review_content.Placements: Quadra Institute of Medical Sciences offers very good studies and it is nice in academic activities. This college offers 6 months of internships on campus and 6 months off campus. Almost 100% of students are offered on-campus internships. The faculty is good .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is not so good. Campus is very small and compact. No grounds and sports. The hostel is also not good. Mess food is also very bad. The electricity supply of the hostel is not proper. There is Wi-Fi connectivity on the ground floor of the college building .

review_summary.college_name: Uttarakhand Ayurved University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery(BAMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college life in Dehradun - The faculty of Ayurveda.

content.Placements: Medical college does not provide any placement to anyone. When you complete the course, you can do a job in medical residence as a president medical officer. The salary depends on how much you put effort into your study and practice. If you have a good practice, they provide you with good money or you can open your clinic which depends on you.
content.Infrastructure: The course is good. You have to study both modern as well as Ayurveda simultaneously. You have to study all the subjects of medicine like in MBBS and also have to study Ayurveda in-depth. Hostels are not bad but they are not also great. Its annual charge is Rs.15,000. A tiffin service is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Almost 90%-95% of students are placed in the BSc nursing course. The average salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Max Hospital, Apollo Hospital, Fortis Hospital, Medanta Hospital, Synergy Hospital, and others. Top roles offered in the course include nursing staff, nursing superintendent, clinical educator, community health nurse, psychiatry nurse, critical care nurse, and overseas job offers.
content.Infrastructure: College has well-developed and well-furnished infrastructure and facilities are available. DIMS has fully furnished smart classrooms with all the advanced technology and well-equipped labs that help students with effective learning. A 24-hour Wi-Fi is available and the library has all books. Hostel rooms are fully furnished with double or triple seating arrangements, beds, almirahs, study tables, and chairs. Mess food is good in taste and hygiene in the mess is well-maintained. Many facilities are available in the hostel such as Wi-Fi, laundry, and a gym. Sports facilities are also available such as carrom, football, volleyball, badminton, and table tennis.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Study is far better than any other colleges in Haridwar district.

content.Placements: Approximately 80% of students got placed from our college after completion of their post-graduation. You can do your practice in Ayurveda, or you can open your own Ayurveda hospital, or you can become a professor in your field. After your PG, you can get an average package of 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is good, with a small playground. The college is working hard to improve the campus as much as possible. Hostels are good. Rooms are well-furnished, with attached washrooms. Mess food is average. However, all mess food is average anywhere you go. Sports and events are less of a priority at this college.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I wouldn't recommend this college to anyone.

content.Placements: Quadra Institute of Medical Sciences offers very good studies and it is nice in academic activities. This college offers 6 months of internships on campus and 6 months off campus. Almost 100% of students are offered on-campus internships. The faculty is good .
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is not so good. Campus is very small and compact. No grounds and sports. The hostel is also not good. Mess food is also very bad. The electricity supply of the hostel is not proper. There is Wi-Fi connectivity on the ground floor of the college building .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medical Lab Technology (BMLT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college gives you the best opportunity to shine. Don't regret it later.

content.Placements: The MLT course provides excellent career opportunities with a high placement rate and competitive packages. The strong internship support further enhances students' readiness for the job market. The percentage of students securing internships ranges from 80% to 95%. Internship companies include AIMS Rishikesh, Doon Government Hospital, Max Hospital, and Synergy.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is quite good. You get all the facilities like a gym, kettle, induction, free Wi-Fi, and a garden. The food quality in the mess and canteen is commendable, offering a variety of nutritious options that cater to different dietary preferences. Meals are prepared fresh daily, and the menu rotates frequently to keep things interesting. Overall, the combination of excellent academic facilities and a comfortable living environment makes for an enriching experience.

The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,16,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 5 years. PG courses are offered for 3 years.

The cutoff for the BAMS based on category for General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD category candidates are given in the table below. Examining the Round 6 Cutoff list, the closing ranks for General AI quota candidates was 105381. The most sought-after course as per the cutoff list is Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery(BAMS).

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty but bad college maintenance of environment and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are no lecture rooms available here. There is no Wi-Fi available on campus or in the hostel. The classrooms are small and dusty. reviews.review_heading: Dims Where Future Shines
reviews.review_text: Dims offers average infrastructure. The library has all the books required for your course and provides a good seating area. They also have many labs, such as the advanced nursing lab and anatomy labs, where each and every dummy is available.

reviews.review_heading: Really amazing faculty and amazing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is great. There is a proper lab for each subject, and classrooms are well-furnished and maintained. However, there isn't much variety of food available in the canteen, and Wi-Fi is not provided. The hospital offers excellent medical facilities, and a sports meet is held every year with a proper playground. Hostels are not available yet.

reviews.review_heading: Worth it course and college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available in the college, including the canteen, library, sports and laboratory. There's no hostel right now but one hotel is currently being built. The food in the canteen is hygienic and tasty. There are various sports available, like cricket, football and basketball.

review_content.Placements: I have been a dental student here at Meenakshi Ammal Dental College and Hospital for almost 4 years (My final year). We are a class of 90 students. The package given to interns is low, but the patient flow is good as it is situated in one of the main areas of the city.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lecture hall accommodates more than 100 students and has a theatrical pattern. The classroom is fully air-conditioned with a smartboard. It is bright with a good feeling of warmth. Meanwhile, the hostel and mess food are above average. Air-conditioned rooms are available. There are four hostels, 3 for girls and 1 for boys, 2 inside the campus and 2 outside the campus. Even though the campus is small, the facilities are not compromised. This helps in getting to know other batchmates and other students better. It is also an anti-ragging campus. The basketball court is at the centre, and the cricket nets are towards the right. There are trees in most places, and they have their own biological names. The mess has a fixed food schedule. The hostel rules are equal for both girls and boys. A large number of games are available, ranging from futsal to table tennis.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a decent and an average college for the fee charges.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students get placed every year. During my admission, all the 100 seats are filled. Placements are not so tough, if you have a decent mark then you can get admitted easily. It has high fee charges but not as high as other competitive colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. This campus settles in 1 acre. It has every availability with necessities. Hostel is fine but I'm not satisfied with the hostel food., It doesn't have a separate sports ground. There is just a basketball court available that too is used as a parking lot many times. But they do conduct games, sports, and activities.

faqs.answer: A:    Dadasaheb Balpande College of Pharmacy is a well-known institution for Ph.D, B.Pharma, D.Pharma, M.Pharma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Dadasaheb Balpande College of Pharmacy has course specializations in Quality Assurance , Pharmaceutical.

reviews_list.review_title: Point of all DBCOPIANs.

review_content.Placements: My batch consists of a total of 124 students. College provides internships in many pharmaceutical companies likeSnehal Pharma, Lupin, Oracity Life Sciences, etc. College also provides placement in various companies and industries. 70% of students got internships from college at various companies and the rest are for pharmacy shops.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and library are well-maintained in my college. Every book regarding my course is available in library. Campus includes sports grounds with various sports organized. Canteen is also good. Overall, everything is up to the mark.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college but quite costly.

review_content.Placements: In case of placements, about 30 percent of students get placed every year, and the average package is around 2 Lacs per annum to 2.5 Lacs per annum. In the case of internships, the same 30 to 40 percent of students get internships. Since I am not a pass-out student yet, I don't know much about the companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are well-provided, with separate buildings for Diploma, degree, and Masters students. The classrooms are well-furnished with tables, and we have a separate library section. The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi, though the canteen is closed most of the time.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My thoughts about my college .

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 6 Lacs per annum and the lowest is 3 Lacs per annum. Many companies come to recruit students from our college. All the students are required to do internship before passing out. The top roles offered were drug inspector, pharmacist, and marketing representative .
review_content.Infrastructure: Water cooler, parking, library, Wi-Fi, study rooms and all medical facilities are available for students. Our college also has a canteen. Hostel facilities are not available. The teachers are very helpful and very nice in nature. There are multiple programs and tours organized for the students.

review_summary.college_name: Dadasaheb Balpande College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best pharmacy college in Nagpur.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students got placed in B.Pharma course. The average package is 4 LPA. There are many companies which are recruiting students. There are very much roles companies offer with the highest package and salary. Students also got internships.
content.Infrastructure: There is a spacious lab and equipment in the college. Labs, digital classroom, canteen, library, sports, and medical facilities are also available. There are library and canteen for the students. There is a gym and sports ground for the students. The nature is very positive.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good quality of education and upgrowing college with well-talented faculty members.

content.Placements: Balpande College of Pharmacy has good placement cells. Talented students get 100% full placement. In the batch of M.Pharm 2024, every student got placed with a good LPA of about 4 LPA as a starting package in companies like Cipla and Unicorn.
content.Infrastructure: Balpande College of Pharmacy in the Vidarbha region has good placements, well-equipped and high-technology labs. Each machine costs more than lakhs, such as a spray dryer, rota rotator spheronizer, and many more.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Point of all DBCOPIANs.

content.Placements: My batch consists of a total of 124 students. College provides internships in many pharmaceutical companies likeSnehal Pharma, Lupin, Oracity Life Sciences, etc. College also provides placement in various companies and industries. 70% of students got internships from college at various companies and the rest are for pharmacy shops.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and library are well-maintained in my college. Every book regarding my course is available in library. Campus includes sports grounds with various sports organized. Canteen is also good. Overall, everything is up to the mark.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college but quite costly.

content.Placements: In case of placements, about 30 percent of students get placed every year, and the average package is around 2 Lacs per annum to 2.5 Lacs per annum. In the case of internships, the same 30 to 40 percent of students get internships. Since I am not a pass-out student yet, I don't know much about the companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are well-provided, with separate buildings for Diploma, degree, and Masters students. The classrooms are well-furnished with tables, and we have a separate library section. The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi, though the canteen is closed most of the time.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My thoughts about my college .

content.Placements: The highest package is 6 Lacs per annum and the lowest is 3 Lacs per annum. Many companies come to recruit students from our college. All the students are required to do internship before passing out. The top roles offered were drug inspector, pharmacist, and marketing representative .
content.Infrastructure: Water cooler, parking, library, Wi-Fi, study rooms and all medical facilities are available for students. Our college also has a canteen. Hostel facilities are not available. The teachers are very helpful and very nice in nature. There are multiple programs and tours organized for the students.

highlights.summary:
The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for Barkatullah University admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
BU Bhopal popular programmes are MBA and BSc. MBA and BSc students are placed in top companies such as TCS, Infosys, Genpact, and others. MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, or can go for various job opportunities relevant to their field. MBA students are trained to join the corporate world as soon as they finish their Management degrees. MBA students are taught the presentation skills, communication skills, and various other skills.
Overall, Barkatullah Vishwavidyalaya Bhopal is one of the top universities present in India. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Barkatullah Vishwavidyalaya, Bhopal and their respective eligibility and BU University Bhopal fee structure:

placements.overview: The mode of Barkatullah University course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on merit and entrance exam scores. The accepted entrance exams are CUET-PG, SSAT, and others. Candidates willing to get admission through CUET must first register for the CUET exam. Then appear for the CUET exam. Then appear for the counselling and visit the selected and allotted university. Pay the admission fee along with the admission form. The below-mentioned are Barkatullah University admission dates for 2025:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    The placement rate for MBA in Barkatullah Universirty is almost 62%. Several Indian and foreign companies visit the college for recruiting students. The highest package offered till now has been 9 lacs p. a. and the average package is 5-6 lacs. Amazon,  Wipro,  and IBM are the top recruiting companies for MBA. The college also provides placement trainings and you can also avail internships.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Best private college for placement, but the overall campus life is very mediocre.

review_content.Placements: Placements are one of the major reasons why students take admission in my college. Placement percentage is well over 80% all across the CSE and other specialisation branches. The highest package that was offered to a student was 1.12cr from Amazon. The lowest package is around 2 LPA. While the average package is around 2.5 LPA. Since my branch AIADS is a new one, it's not possible find concrete placement states for my particular branch. However, this year we have seen that placement has not been very good. Very few students got placed this year. This year so far, 35% students got placed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is good but not the best. If you can go to IITs, please never choose this college.

review_content.Placements: I think it is about above 75 percent. The highest package offered by this college is 16 LPA. The average package is 4 to 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies that recruit in the college are TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Planet Park, Hexaware, etc. I do not know much about internships, but I think it is a good percentage.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have well-facilitated labs, but classrooms are not that good. But I think it does not matter because study does not depend on what type of classroom we have; it depends on ourselves. I do not think that hostels are in good condition because there is nothing much to live in, so the hostels are not that good. But I think it does not matter for students who want to be successful.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: NIT Manipur JEE Main cutoff 2024 has been released for admission to the BTech courses. During the Round 1 cutoff, the closing rank for CSE was 25886 for the General category students under the AII India Quota. Among OBC candidates, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 8750. faqs.answer: BA LLB is one of the popular courses of BU Bhopal. BA LLB is a five-year Integrated course spread across 10 semesters. The curriculum includes in-depth study of the Law programme. Apart from curriculum, the fee for BA LLB at BU Bhopal is also less in comparison to other top universities in Bhopal. The total tuition fee for BA LLB ranges between INR 1.1 lakh and INR 1.8 lakh.Talking about placements, the university has a dedicated placement cell that organizes campus placements for final year students. Some of the major recruiters that take part of the placement drive of Barkatullah University are includes VM Ware, DRDO, ISRO, BARC, BHEL, BEL, NTPC, IBM, Bajaj Allianz, TCS, Tech Mahindra, etc.
faqs.question: Q: Is Barkatullah University good for BA LLB?

faqs.answer: Yes, Barkatullah University offers four-year BE programme spread across eight semesters. The university offers BE in various specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, etc. through the Faculty of Engineering. The selection for BE programme is based on JEE and Class 12 score.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Joining my BSSS, read this.

content.Placements: About 60 percent of students get placements. The highest package from the college is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is approximately 2.8 LPA. Placements start in the final year of college, and to grab opportunities, you have to do internships. Top recruiting companies include Wipro, Amazon, and Accenture, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility is provided in the college, but it has a limit of 1 GB per person. They provide 3–4 computer labs, and the classrooms are average. The infrastructure of the college is good, it is small but elegant. The hostel facility is good for girls only, not for boys. The food provided in the mess is average, and medical and sports facilities are provided.

content.Placements: 100 percent placement, if you regularly attend college and T&P Classes and give weekly tests in T&P classes. The placement percentage varies year to year, but recently, 80-85 percent of students got placed from Bhopal. The average package is around 3 LPA, and the highest package is reported to be 9.5 LPA. So the overall placement percentage of Technocrats Institute is quite good.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very well educated and helpful in everything. Technocrats Institute of Technology has a very beautiful infrastructure, and Wi-Fi and smart classes are available in the college. The laboratories are designed very nicely according to AICTE standards. A 1000-seat auditorium is available. The hostel and mess are average.

admission_overview.title: Barkatullah University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: BU Bhopal admissions are primarily entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like CUET, CUET-PG, JEE Main, etc. to provide admission. The university has more than 500 affiliated and constituent colleges. Barkatullah University recognised by UGC offers UG, PG, doctorate and diploma programmes across various disciplines under University Teaching Departments (UTDs) and affiliated colleges. Barkatullah University offers there courses in various streams such as Management, Arts, Commerce, Information Science, Computer Application, Medicine, Social Work, and Physiotherapy, among others. Check below Barkatullah University admission process: 1. Eligibility: Candidates must first check eligibility for the selected programme on the university's website.

paragraphs: Barkatullah University admissionis a multi-step process. Candidates need to start by registering for the course of their choice. The university selects candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Below is step-wise admission details for BU Bhopal:
1:Barkatullah University Application Process 2025

Candidates wishing to apply for any of the Barkatullah University courses can apply online on the official website of the university. Aspirants will need to pay an application fee and submit the specified documents for completing the application process. The application fee is INR 300 for General and OBC (INR 150 for SC/ ST) students.
: Selection Rounds

The university offers admission to candidates based on entrance exam or merit in the last qualifying exam. CUET-UG score is accepted for most of the UG courses. Candidates need to pass CUET-PG for MA, MSc and LLM programmes. For all other courses, selection is based on merit of the aspirants.
3: Seat Allotment & Confirmation

BU Bhopal releases a provisional seat allotment list. Candidates have to select their department to view the provisional allotment list. Selected aspirants need to confirm their seats after document verification at the university.

Barkatullah University fees are divided semester-wise. For most of the courses, the fee is same for boys and girls. However, in some courses, relaxation is provided to girls. The fee includes components other than the tuition fee. Below areBU Bhopal feesfor top courses:
Note:This information is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat intake varies course-wise in BU Bhopal. There is a regular and a payment seat for candidates. A payment seat is one for which admission is granted upon payment of a fee that exceeds the tuition and other charges specified by the university. As per the vacancy, seats are filled in the university. Below is BU Bhopal seat intake for top courses:
Note:This information is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Note:The seat intake is only for the campus course and excludes the intake in affiliated colleges.

courses_data.name: Barkatullah University B.Ed Admission 2025
courses_data.description: B.Ed is a two-year course spread across four semesters. BU Bhopal offers B.Ed through Faculty of Education. Candidates who have completed graduation with at least 50% aggregate can apply for B.Ed programme.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to B.Ed at Barkatullah University?
faqs.answer: To get admission to Barkatullah University B.Ed admissions, the first step is to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria before applying for the course. Candidates who passed graduation with minimum 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for B.Ed course. Admission to this course is done through the past academic records of candidates, followed by DTE and Deptt. of Higher Education, Govt. of MP rules and procedures.

faqs.question: What are the essential qualifications for admission to B.Ed course at Barkatullah University?
faqs.answer: Candidates willing to get admission to B.Ed course at Barkatullah University must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria to apply for the course. Candidates who passed Class 12 and graduation in any stream from a recognised university are eligible to apply for admission at BU Bhopal. Aspirants must have secured minimum of 50% aggregate in the last qualifying exam of their graduation level exams.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for the B.Ed programme at Barkatullah University?
faqs.answer: The seat intake forB.Ed at Barkatullah Universityis8620. It varies from one college to another. BU Bhopal B.Ed seat allotment process is carried out on a merit-basis and as per the sanctioned seat intake. The mentioned seat count is further taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the procedure to take B.Ed admission at Barkatullah University?
faqs.answer: Candidates are first required to register for B.Ed course on the official website of the university. Before applying, aspirants shall ensure that they fulfil the course-specific eligibility requirements or the applications is treated as invalid. Candidates are shortlisted for B.Ed based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Once the candidates are selected, they are called for document verification. Shortlisted aspirants must pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

The leading recruiters during Barkatullah University placements in recent past included TCS, Infosys and Genpact .

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Barkatullah University?
faqs.answer: The placement rate for MBA in Barkatullah Universirty is almost 62%. Several Indian and foreign companies visit the college for recruiting students. The highest package offered till now has been 9 lacs p. a. and the average package is 5-6 lacs. Amazon, Wipro, and IBM are the top recruiting companies for MBA. The college also provides placement trainings and you can also avail internships.

faqs.question: What are the career options after B.Ed at Barkatullah University?
faqs.answer: On completing Bachelor of Education course from Barkatullah University, aspirants can become teachers at the primary, secondary and senior secondary levels in private schools. Below are the job options available after completing the degree from top B.Ed Colleges in India : Job Profile Average Annual Salary (in INR) School Teacher 5- 9 LPA Curriculum Developer 3.5- 6 LPA Private Educator 2.5- 4 LPA Career Counsellor 4- 6 LPA Education Administrator 6- 9 LPA Note- The above salary has been taken from external sources, and hence may vary.

faqs.question: What is the fees of Barkatullah University?
faqs.answer: Barkatullah University fees vary for UG & PG courses. Students have to pay a certain amount of the fee at the time of admission, the rest of the fees will be paid semester-wise. For most of the courses, the fee is same for boys and girls. However, in some courses, relaxation is provided to girls. The total fees of BU Bhopal may include various components such as Tuition Fees, Examination Fees, Library Fees, etc. Find below the course-wise tuition fees for various UG & PG courses offered at Barkatullah University: Course Name Total Tuition Fee MA INR 1,900 - INR 33,800 B.Ed INR 32,000 - INR 1.4 lakh MSc INR 2,600 - INR 2.7 lakh BTech INR 1.7 lakh MBA INR 76,500 - INR 3 lakh BA LLB INR 1.1 lakh - INR 1.8 lakh Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What are the fees for B.Ed programmes at Barkatullah University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Barkatullah University B.Ed ranges between INR 36,000 and INR 1.4 lakh . This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Hence, is indicative. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, programme fee, candidates also need to pay an application fee in the start.

faqs.question: How much is the BA LLB fee at Barkatullah University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Barkatullah University BA LLB is INR 2.8 lakh. This fee is calculated as per the data available on unofficial sources and hence can vary. Aspirants need to pay their course fee once all the selection rounds are over to confirm their seat in the university. The fee includes varies components like tuition fee, exam fee, caution deposit, etc. Apart from the programme fee, candidates also need to pay a registration fee in the start.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology,BhopalReviewed on 14 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Low staff, and fees are unclear.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, this college looked good and looked strong brick by brick, security was good, but the facilities were not so good. The canteen was so bad, nothing was there to eat, just chips and samosas. No sports in college. Fees structure is so bad, some have Rs. 10,000, some have Rs. 15,000.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by The Bhopal School of Social SciencesReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Joining my BSSS, read this.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is provided in the college, but it has a limit of 1 GB per person. They provide 3–4 computer labs, and the classrooms are average. The infrastructure of the college is good, it is small but elegant. The hostel facility is good for girls only, not for boys. The food provided in the mess is average, and medical and sports facilities are provided.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, BhopalReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best private college for placement, but the overall campus life is very mediocre.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs in our college, and every single one of them has ethernet connection. The library has Wi-Fi for studying. One drawback is that you can't use a laptop or mobile in the classroom, even if you are using it for studying. The hostel is well-maintained and clean. The mess food is not very good, and the sports facilities are average since the ground is not very well taken care of. The hostel is only allotted for 1st year to boys, while girls can stay for the duration of their course...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Samrat Ashok Technological InstituteReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is good but not the best. If you can go to IITs, please never choose this college.
reviews.review_text: We have well-facilitated labs, but classrooms are not that good. But I think it does not matter because study does not depend on what type of classroom we have; it depends on ourselves. I do not think that hostels are in good condition because there is nothing much to live in, so the hostels are not that good. But I think it does not matter for students who want to be successful.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Technocrats Institute of Technology (Excellence)
reviews.review_heading: Best college I ever heard of, if you find the best college in Bhopal. I recommended Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of technocrats institute of technology is quite good for students. Classrooms are very neat and clean labs are fully equipped with gadgets. The price of the hostel is very reasonable. Their food qualities are acceptable. Basic medical facilities available for a student.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Technocrats Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: As I want to do something in AI, with my low JEE percentile.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very well educated and helpful in everything. Technocrats Institute of Technology has a very beautiful infrastructure, and Wi-Fi and smart classes are available in the college. The laboratories are designed very nicely according to AICTE standards. A 1000-seat auditorium is available. The hostel and mess are average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute for Excellence in Higher EducationReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A good college for pursuing B.Com.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good. The library is also good, and the infrastructure is also good. Many students study in this college. It has a big library to study and practice questions using library resources. All students can take books home to study.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by The Bhopal School of Social SciencesReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2023 and really good infrastructure and facilities in the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the college are very good. There are compact classrooms, and events also take place. There are many other facilities for sports and other activities. The college is very good, with a very good environment. All facilities are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, BhopalReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent placements, the worst faculty members, small campus.
reviews.review_text: The campus size is decent. They provide hostels for both genders, but for boys, you can stay in the college hostel only for the first year, and then from the second year, you have to leave it. They do have all the grounds for football, cricket, badminton, volleyball, basketball, and all. Mess food is okay.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by The Bhopal School of Social SciencesReviewed on 6 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the BSSS College.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is provided in the college but it has a limit of 1 GB per person. The food provided in the mess is average, and medical and sports facilities are also provided.

faqs.question: Which companies visit Kanpur Institute of Technology for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    A drop of 75% was recorded in the 2022 in the highest package when compared with 2021.The number of students placed in 2022 dropped by nearly 3% when compared with 2021. Students are eligible for placements from the 7th semester. There are several companies who have visited Kanpur Institute of Technology for placement purpose. The average package offered is INR 4LPA and the highest package students got in this year 2024 is INR 7 LPA. If you have skills and knowledge to crack an interview t
faqs.question: Does Kanpur Institute of Technology have good placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Kanpur Institute of technology, since its inception in 2004, is one of the finest institutions in Kanpur and Uttar Pradesh as well. It is better for CSE, it is good in terms of placement and the fees depends upon the type of course one wants to study. If we talk about the fees of B.Tech then approximate it's 75000 per year, which is kind of affordable as compared to other colleges which require Lacs of fees.
faqs.question: Is Kanpur Institute of Technology expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates are required to appear for equivalent exams such as JEECUP, JEE Mains, CUET UG, CUET PG or equivalent in order to take admissions in these courses. The KIT Kanpur admissions are based on the marks obtained in the entrance examination as well as the performance in the past academics.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Kanpur Institute of Technology for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you may join Kanpur Institute of Technology without JEE Main, but with direct admission against vacant seats only, which account for 15% of total seats under management/NRI quota. Otherwise, admission is by entrance examinations like JEE Main, JEECUP, or CUET (NTA), as the case may be, based on the course. For B.Tech courses like IT, JEE Main is necessary, and for Diploma courses like Civil Engineering, JEECUP is necessary.
faqs.question: Can I join Kanpur Institute of Technology without JEE Main?

faqs.answer: A:    Kanpur institute of technology is a private university located in kanpur, Uttar Pradesh. It runs UG and PG courses, like B.Tech, BFA, BFAD, BBA, M.Tech., MBA, MCA, etc. in engineering, business administration, fine arts, and computer application. For MBA course you have to score 19,000 to 20,000 rank. If you get 88% in CUET then you got a chance to get admission in MBA course.
faqs.question: Can I get Kanpur Institute of Technology, MBA with 88% in CUET?

reviews_list.review_title: KIT Kanpur - Affordable engineering with strong CSE placements and supportive campus.

review_content.Placements: Overall, placement rate is 60-94%, depending on branch and batch. Major companies visit KIT. In CSE\IT, average package is 4 LPA - 6 LPA. It is a decent college, if you work hard. There is a good chance you will get placed. Overall, it is a good college for admission.
review_content.Infrastructure: Smart classrooms with projectors, AC in most of the rooms, and well-equipped labs with the latest systems and tools. We have large library with books, journals, and provide e-resources. We have high-speed internet access throughout campus, fully functional workshops, and AC seminar halls used for training and events.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I experienced the best at this college.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing BCA and around 95% of students from my batch got placed in their dream company with a 2 LPA to 5 LPA package offered. faqs.answer: The hostel fees for BSc students at KIT Kanpur completely depend on the accommodation selected by the candidates. The institute offers host rooms in more than 5 buildings. The hostel fees for non-AC rooms are INR 73,000 per year and INR 90,000 for AC rooms per year. Moreover, a student can pay the hostel fees in two-semester instalments.

Vacant seats in the MBA course will be filled by the institute within 15 days after the last date of counseling. Priority will be given to actual as well as eligible applicants, their relative merit will be decided on the basis of their rank in CUET PG Exam and UPTAC counselling.

Candidates need to possess a relevant Diploma in engineering with 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ST candidates). The course permits students to join the course directly in the second year and gives industry-oriented training.

review_summary.college_name: KIT Kanpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, good infrastructure and a helpful faculty.

content.Placements: 80% students get placed. The highest package offered is 50 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS and Infosys. 90% from Google, Tata Motors, and Information Technology. The college boasts experienced and dedicated faculty, supportive administrative staff, and a strong placement record. Companies like TCS and Infosys recruiting students for various roles. Placement support is generally strong.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has modern labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are clean and secure, the mess food is hygienic, the canteen offers a variety, and medical support. Sports grounds and indoor games ensure a balanced campus life.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Don't take admission here if you want better college life. If you want a degree, then go for it.

content.Placements: 10% of students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys and TCS. 20% of students got internships from our college. Internships provided by the college are of no use and not that much worthy. Instead of going with college internship, you can find a better one externally.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and library are top-notch, except there's always a network issue in the college. No Wi-Fi is provided. Medical facilities are average. Sports and games facilities are good. Mess and canteen food are below average. No non-veg is allowed inside the college, not even in the mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: KIT Kanpur - Affordable engineering with strong CSE placements and supportive campus.

content.Placements: Overall, placement rate is 60-94%, depending on branch and batch. Major companies visit KIT. In CSE\IT, average package is 4 LPA - 6 LPA. It is a decent college, if you work hard. There is a good chance you will get placed. Overall, it is a good college for admission.
content.Infrastructure: Smart classrooms with projectors, AC in most of the rooms, and well-equipped labs with the latest systems and tools. We have large library with books, journals, and provide e-resources. We have high-speed internet access throughout campus, fully functional workshops, and AC seminar halls used for training and events.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I experienced the best at this college.

content.Placements: I am pursuing BCA and around 95% of students from my batch got placed in their dream company with a 2 LPA to 5 LPA package offered. The best companies come for placement like Wipro, Infosys, TCL, etc. They offered the best roles in IT sector and in my course, 100% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: I am using campus Wi-Fi regularly and I haven't faced any issues yet, and the library is so silent for study and fully air-conditioned. The hostel is good, but I face some issues in the hostel mess. The size of the hostel rooms is so good, and they provide all the equipment for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, supportive faculty, and decent infrastructure for CSE students.

content.Placements: I am a student of B.Tech in CSE at KIT from the 2024-2028 batch. In our course, around 80-85% of students get placed. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA (off-campus), the average package is 4.5-5 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, and others. The most common roles offered are Software Developer, QA Tester, and Data Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The CSE department has a good infrastructure with smart classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. Hostel facilities are decent. The mess food is average, and medical help is available on campus. Sports and indoor games are also provided. It is a very good college for students who belong to middle-class families.

admission_process.title: Kanpur Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kanpur Institute of Technology admission 2025 offers a range of UG and PG programmes including B.Tech, BFA, BFAD, BBA, M.Tech., MBA, and MCA. The BTech programme, has 6 specialisations, and admits students directly into the second year through lateral entry MTech programmes, available in Civil, Electronics and Communication, and Mechanical Engineering, require a minimum of 60% in BTech/BE with relaxation for reserved categories. Additionally,Kanpur Institute of Technologyoffers full-time Polytechnic programmes in Computer Science, Electrical, Electronics and Communication, Mechanical, and Civil Engineering, both in three-year and second-year (lateral entry) formats.

For Kanpur Institute of Technology admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toKanpur Institute of Technology courseadmissions 2025:
Kanpur Institute of Technology admission process include registration, selection and fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat in Kanpur Institute of Technology:
STEP 1: Kanpur Institute of Technology Application Process 2025

Candidates must download the application form from the official website of Kanpur Institute of Technology. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.
STEP 2: Selection

Kanpur Institute of Technology shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam as well as entrance exams such as, CUET, JEECUP, and JEE Main. The college evaluates the application form of the candidates for their eligibility.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.
Check out the below video for more information:

placement_data.title: KIT Kanpur Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Kanpur Institute of Technology has yet to publish its complete placement report for 2025. As stated on the Official Website, there were a total of 3,000 placements during the 2025 placement season at Kanpur Institute of Technology. The highest salary package awarded to students was INR 25 LPA. More than 200 companies participated in the 2025 placement drive at KIT. Earlier in 2024 the KIT Kanpur placement percentage stood at 87%. The highest package bagged by the students was INR 10 LPA, and the average package stood at INR 2.50 LPA. More than 391 job offers were made. A total of 105 companies participated and selected 552 students.

Kanpur Institute of Technology has a skill development cell that focuses on upgrading skills to international standards through significant industry involvement. The institute also has a Placements and Corporate Relations Cell (PCRC) that engages with industry and constantly strives to expand the industry-academia interface. The cell conducts training sessions, seminars, and many important webinars to update students’ skills in all formats according to global market requirements. KIT Kanpur has also organised various industrial visits to Havells Pvt. Ltd., Baddi, BHEL Ltd., Haridwar, Brooks Laboratories Ltd., Chandigarh, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good infrastructure and a helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our department has modern labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are clean and secure, the mess food is hygienic, the canteen offers a variety, and medical support. Sports grounds and indoor games ensure a balanced campus life.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission here if you want better college life. If you want a degree, then go for it.
reviews.review_text: Labs and library are top-notch, except there's always a network issue in the college. No Wi-Fi is provided. Medical facilities are average. Sports and games facilities are good. Mess and canteen food are below average. No non-veg is allowed inside the college, not even in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: KIT Kanpur - Affordable engineering with strong CSE placements and supportive campus.
reviews.review_text: Smart classrooms with projectors, AC in most of the rooms, and well-equipped labs with the latest systems and tools. We have large library with books, journals, and provide e-resources. We have high-speed internet access throughout campus, fully functional workshops, and AC seminar halls used for training and events.

reviews.review_heading: I experienced the best at this college.
reviews.review_text: I am using campus Wi-Fi regularly and I haven't faced any issues yet, and the library is so silent for study and fully air-conditioned. The hostel is good, but I face some issues in the hostel mess. The size of the hostel rooms is so good, and they provide all the equipment for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, and decent infrastructure for CSE students.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department has a good infrastructure with smart classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. Hostel facilities are decent. The mess food is average, and medical help is available on campus. Sports and indoor games are also provided. It is a very good college for students who belong to middle-class families.

reviews.review_heading: Kanpur Institute of Technology is the dream chaser.
reviews.review_text: This college had a prestigious infrastructure and a very environment-friendly atmosphere with three huge grounds. It also provided space in the library, labs, computer labs, and centralized AC classrooms. They had delicious food in their canteen along with some food stalls on the ground. The mess, canteen, hostels (for girls and boys), medical facilities, sports, and games. KIT provides the best services in all these areas.

reviews.review_heading: I would rate 4 out of 5 for the college life.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and the library are provided with AC. Wi-Fi is also available. I am not a hostel student, but according to me, the hostel food is average. Sports events are organised on a regular basis. Students are free to play and practice sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our respected HOD is the one I really look upto.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. There is Wi-Fi available. There are vast labs (multiple labs). Classrooms available can fill up to more than 100 students. There is a library available and every book is there. You will also find clean washrooms. There is also cold water available (drinkable). There is a canteen. There is also a garden. There are 3 parking areas, and playground is also available.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good, and it is an autonomous college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of my college are too good. There are airy classrooms and many courses are available. The infrastructure of my college is also good. The hostel facility is good and the quality of food in the mess as well as canteen is great. Medical facilities and extracurricular activities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placement in 2021, and really good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: The campus provides Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a fantastic library. The quality of food in the hostel is very good. The library has a very quiet area, and the classrooms are very clean. The hostel provides hygienic food. The hostel rooms are really good and clean.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience review.
reviews.review_text: KIT was one of the best colleges in Kanpur for graduation because, nowadays, it has become an autonomous college and the first private college in Kanpur. Inside the college, there were three buildings named KIHE, KITP, and KIT, which were the main building for B. Tech and MCA courses. The college provided many facilities like a big playground area with indoor sports, a canteen, 24/7 Wi-Fi with good area coverage, and many more. Labs and classrooms were well-furnished with centralized AC. Facilit...

reviews.review_heading: A short review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is like moderate, but you can also say good. Here some lecture theatres LTs are available in which projectors for a better teaching and understanding experience. There are many computer labs in which 700+ computers are available.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college with good teachers and infrastructure. But it lacks transparency in placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. I am a day scholar, so I do not know about the hostel infrastructure. The library is big, covering two floors. Classrooms are equipped with air conditioners and projectors. Medical facilities are also good, and there are many sports you can choose to play like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, carrom, chess, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel and environment are good. Labs, the library, and classrooms are good. But according to the fee structure of the hostel, the mess food is not good. I live in a PG near college. Medical facilities are good. For sports, our college provides cricket, volleyball, basketball, and badminton. There are indoor games also.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kanpur Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, the food provided by the college is vegetarian. They provide 3 meals a day which is sufficient for me. The hostel room is good but they charge more money for the hostel as compared to other colleges. At last, the infrastructure is good enough to live in a hostel.

likes.text: Many big companies like TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and many more companies visited our campus to offer placements.
Many students got placed in good companies, and students who had completed their intermediate can take admission in this college.

college_info.college_name: KIT Kanpur Scholarship Details

paragraphs: There are many scholarship opportunities available in kanpur institute of technology.

Kanpur Institute of technology, since its inception in 2004, is one of the finest institutions in Kanpur and Uttar Pradesh as well. It is better for CSE, it is good in terms of placement and the fees depends upon the type of course one wants to study. If we talk about the fees of B.Tech then approximate it's 75000 per year, which is kind of affordable as compared to other colleges which require Lacs of fees.
The fees for B.Tech at Kanpur Institute of Technology is INR 3.6 Lacs for the entire 4 year duration.

The Institute offers B.Tech, Polytechnic (Diploma in Engineering), Bachelor of Fine Art (BFA), Bachelor of Fashion And Apparel Design (BFAD), MCA, M.Tech, MBA courses, includes Applied Sciences & Humanities, Department of CSE & IT, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Business Administration, Master of Computer Applications, Applied art and craft, Polytechnic, Biotechnology Departments.
KIT is ranked 9th in 2019 as Best Private Institution in UP, 1st as Best B-School in Kanpur and is ranked 2nd as Best Private Institute in Eastern Uttar Pradesh.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. reviews_list.review_title: The hidden gem - NBMC&H.

review_content.Placements: This college provides internship in the associated hospital. The hospital load is too much. Stipends to interns are provided on time. Last year, the government of West Bengal increased the stipend by 10,000 for interns, and there is 5% increment in stipend per year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities in the academics are well built, but they lag behind in the hostel. Library is fully air conditioned and has a permanent Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is also very pockets friendly. It consists of 12 rupees per month. The campus is too huge.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely I am satisfied with the faculty members, college infrastructure, etc.

review_content.Placements: Campus placements were not conventionally conducted. Mandatory one-year internship was conducted at NBMCH with a stipend. Top recruiting companies/hospitals were government hospitals, private hospitals, NGOs, etc. Top roles offered were medical officer, junior residents, president doctors, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus was spread around 161 acres, one of the largest medical campuses in India. Wi-Fi and internet were available all over campus. It provided fully equipped labs for anatomy, physiology, microbiology, etc. There was a central library with huge amount of books, journals, digital resources, etc. Quality of food was good and served with hygiene.

Top recruiting companies/hospitals were government hospitals, private hospitals, NGOs, etc. Top roles offered were medical officer, junior residents, president doctors, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Campus was spread around 161 acres, one of the largest medical campuses in India. Wi-Fi and internet were available all over campus. It provided fully equipped labs for anatomy, physiology, microbiology, etc. There was a central library with huge amount of books, journals, digital resources, etc. Quality of food was good and served with hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good clinical exposure and poor hostel facilities.

content.Placements: Most students went for PG, so placements were not very large, but around 80% received job offers. The average package was 6–7 LPA, with the highest being 12 LPA. Internships were 100% in government hospitals, with roles like JR and MO. Some joined private hospitals like Apollo and Fortis. The college was good for clinicals.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were okay. Labs and library were decent, but the classrooms needed an upgrade. The hostel was average, and the food was manageable but not very good. The Wi-Fi was slow. There was a sports ground, but it was not well maintained. Medical facilities were available 24x7. Overall, it was quite good..

reviews.review_heading: Review of North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are okay. Labs have all the required instruments and devices for practical experience. The library is also present, and it is good. Wi-Fi facility is available with limited data. There is a sports ground. Overall, it's quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Follow and listen to your passion.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are free Wi-Fi, 3D labs, unlimited resources, HD classrooms, and a big library where each type of book is present. The quality of the hostel is very good, they provide double room facilities, and a clean room. Everything is nice. Food quality and quantity are both nice.

reviews.review_heading: The hidden gem  -  NBMC&H.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in the academics are well built, but they lag behind in the hostel. Library is fully air conditioned and has a permanent Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is also very pockets friendly. It consists of 12 rupees per month. The campus is too huge.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am satisfied with the faculty members, college infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: Campus was spread around 161 acres, one of the largest medical campuses in India. Wi-Fi and internet were available all over campus. It provided fully equipped labs for anatomy, physiology, microbiology, etc. There was a central library with huge amount of books, journals, digital resources, etc. Quality of food was good and served with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Good clinical exposure and poor hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were okay. Labs and library were decent, but the classrooms needed an upgrade. The hostel was average, and the food was manageable but not very good. The Wi-Fi was slow. There was a sports ground, but it was not well maintained. Medical facilities were available 24x7. Overall, it was quite good..

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The department facilities were also good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and libraries were well-maintained. Wi-Fi provided a peaceful environment, and there were computers available for study-related work. If we had an important file, we could save it on the computer. The food in the canteen also tasted good, and we loved it.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: During the first year, we used to get a triple-seater room, and then in the second year, we got two-seater rooms. In the final year and internship, we get single rooms. Rooms are quite spacious with 24-hour power backup and constant water supply.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied because of faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure provided for our department are very satisfying. The classrooms and labs are big and comfortable. A well-stocked library is available. The Wi-Fi facilities are available for everyone. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Very dissatisfied because of the infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities and infrastructure available for our course are not satisfying. Classrooms and labs are not cleaned and no proper ventilation system. The hostel rooms are very congested and small. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities and infrastructure provided for our department were very good. The mess food quality was hygienic, and many varieties of food were available in the canteen. A well-stocked library was present in a huge area. The hostel rooms were comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel is bad among other facilities of the college, had a bad experience in the hostel with no proper quality of food also. The classrooms are not too big and clean enough. But have a huge playground and court for playing and labs with old instruments and equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Budget-friendly college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, infrastructure is a little bit old to maintain transparency. All lecture theatre and department seminar rooms are air-conditioned. A library with free Wi-Fi services is there. Hostel facilities are moderate. Recently hostels has been painted and many modifications are done in the last few months.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with college with a beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good, with air conditioned lecture theatres and a big central library with a huge collection of books. Wi-Fi is available in the academic areas. The hostel condition is not so good and needs renovation. The hostel mess food is good, and there is also the option of private mess in and around the campus. All medical facilities are available. There is a big playground on campus that hosts many events.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, I am absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: We have a central library open from 9 am to 8 pm. Lab facilities are also good. Hostel supplies like the canteen and water supply are all good. All types of curricular activities are also provided apart from studies. Bathrooms are well-furnished with Indian and commode-type toilets and are regularly cleaned by PWD workers.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for MBBS in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good with air-conditioned lecture theatres and a big central library with tons of books. There is Wi-Fi present in the academics. The hostel condition is not so good and requires renovation work. The hostel mess food is good, and there is also the option of private mess in and around the campus. All the medical facilities are available.

college_info.intro:
The Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Chennai is known for its range of courses in the Engineering, Management, Humanities and Arts, Law, etc. streams. Among these courses the BTech and MBA at HIT Chennai stand out as the flagship programmes of the university.
These courses are highly sought-after among students for their placements and career opportunities with HITS BTech graduates able to take on a range of technical roles, all the while BTech students can also choose from among a range of specialisations including CSE, ECE, Mechanical Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.
While students of the HITS MBA programme are trained for less technical roles with an emphasis on Management and Leadership positions. Graduates will find a skill-set and foundation tailor made for the industry and job market with the university having a strong placement rate of 93.94% during recent years.
Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. HITS Chennai courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry.
