admission_process.title: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HITS admission is mainly based on the university’s in-house entrance exam, i.e., HITSEEE & HITSCAT.Hindustan Universityconducts HITSEEE to provide admission to BTech courses. HITSCAT is the new entrance test conducted by the institute for admission to BDes, Law, Management, and some other courses. Additionally, some national entrance exams are also accepted for admission. These include UGC NET, CLAT, and GATE. Apart from this, the university also has a Centre for Open and Digital Education where six courses are taught online including both UG and PG level courses. Hindustan University courses offered include UG, PG, Doctoral, and Integrated courses in popular streams. These are BCom, BBA, BCA, MA, MBA, and MCA.

The institute offers more than 11 courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science admission highlights 2025:
Particulars
HITS Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
11 courses across various specialisations
How to apply?
https://hindustanuniv.ac.in/
Application Status
Level of programmes offered

HITS offers a diverse range of undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and integrated programs in popular fields. Thes include courses from Science, Engineering, Management, Humanities, and Medicine. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularHindustan Institute of Technology and Science courses:
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate
Graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) has a multi-step admission process that students need to follow to get into the university. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the entrance exam followed by selection rounds and lastly confirmation of admission. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university. Interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the programmes is based on the entrance exam. Check below the complete HITS admission process:
1 - HITS Application 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
2 - HITS Admission Selection rounds
Appear for the university-based entrance exam i.e., HITSEEE & HITSCAT. The selection will be based on entrance exam score and GDPI and then wait for the release of their merit list.
3 - HITS Document Verification
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: How can I join Hindustan Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) has a multi-step admission process which students need to follow to get into the university. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the entrance exam followed by selection rounds and lastly confirmation of admission. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university. Interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the programmes is based on the entrance exam. Candidates must check the eligibility criteria on the official website of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science, before filling out the admission form.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science?
faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers a large diversity of courses to students in various fields. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science admissions are held on the basis of both merit and entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as HITSEEE, HITSCAT, NATA, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at Hindustan University placements?
faqs.answer: The Hindustan University average package offered to BTech and BArch students during Hindustan University placements 2024 stood at INR 4.60 LPA and INR 4.50 LPA, respectively. The following table showcases the Hindustan University packages offered in 2024 placement drive: Course Average Package (2024) BTech INR 4.6 LPA MTech INR 4.5 LPA MBA INR 4.5 LPA BArch INR 4.5 LPA Note: The above-mentioned packages are taken from the official website. These are assumed as average packages as only salary was mentioned on the official website.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for MBA at HITS Chennai?
faqs.answer: The total fee for HITS Chennai MBA courses is cumulative of multiple components, such as security deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. Selected candidates have to pay admission fee amount after selection for seat confirmation. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science MBA tuition fee range from INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 4.3 lakh . Additionally, the one-time fee is INR 8,500 and the hostel charges range from INR 1.48 Lacs to INR 1.64 lakh . It must be noted that the mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee for LLB at Hindustan University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for LLB courses at Hindustan University is INR 5 lakh. Candidates also have to pay tutition fee and hostel fee. Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

nirf.description:
HITS ERP has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2024.
It has been recognized that the institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, HITS ERP's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, HITS ERP's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, HITS ERP's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel.description:
The hostels have well-furnished air-conditioned and regular rooms with attached restrooms providing the right ambience for the students. There are five residential halls for boys and three for girls on campus
that accommodate over 2500 students. State of the art kitchen and spacious dining area has been provided for both the hostels and a customized menu caters to the student’s needs. Hygiene and cleanliness is emphasized in the hostel. All the hostels offer a variety of services and opportunities for students. Staff members residing in the hostel are assigned to address academic and personal problems of the students. Round-the-clock security, communication, dispensary facilities are also available.

library.description: The HITS' Library has a collection of 105253 books, 42262 online journals and 389 printed journals, 12 newspaper, 64 thesis and dissertations, 3031 project reports and 2792 CDs. The Library system consists of a Central Library and Departmental Libraries which collectively support the teaching, research and extension programmes of the Institute. All students, faculty members and employees of the Institute are entitled to use the Library facilities enrolling membership.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Horse Riding, Cycling, Boxing, Karate, Volleyball Court, Throwball, Athletics, Aerobics, Martial Arts, Table Tennis, Billiards and Snooker

Besides, fast food and other eateries are also available.

reviews.review_heading: MBA in Business Analytics.
reviews.review_text: A lot of controversies happened in the college, especially during the inter college cultural which severely disrupted the pace of the whole college. Providing permission for conducting such events often in the college causes the students to lower their concentration on academics and placement wise. Apart from all the beautiful campus it looks like the best facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus infrastructure, and they conduct many events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science is awesome and full of greenish environment. It gives a peaceful mind for the students to concentrate on their studies. Labs with well quality equipments, and they give importance to studies as well as sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: College should always be proud of their student's achievements. College is so good by the means of transportation facilities. They also collect very minimal charges for every student for transportation. Apart from grading systems, college looks for well-disciplined students.

reviews.review_heading: A detailed insight of my college placements, infrastructure, teachers, curriculum, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent and green. The drainage systems are well maintained, and in rainy seasons there won't be much clogged water. There are different architectural buildings for different departments. Library is well-maintained and air-conditioned. There are football field, basketball court, badminton court, etc. There are 2 canteens and a mini super-market is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed insights into my college placements, infrastructure, faculty, curriculum, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent and green. The drainage systems are well maintained, and in rainy seasons there won't be much clogged water. There are different architectural buildings for different departments. The library is well-maintained and air-conditioned. There are football field, basketball court, badminton court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the college and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are clean and hygienic and have all the equipment required for the particular course. When it comes to me, I study computer Science (AI&this), labs are very good, with good signal strength, and proper systems for coding. Being a day scholar I'm unaware of the hostel but my friends living in hostel tells that the rooms are great, good needs to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: The food is good in the hostel and also there are clinic in our college for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: The start of my twenties in the best place HITS.
reviews.review_text: HITS has good infrastructure where it is peaceful and quiet in common with more trees. Also, the hostels are well-equipped with basic need amenities. The quality of the food is also very hygienic and clean. At last, the best part is the library which is very large and peaceful to our work.

reviews.review_heading: Need improvements in placements, classrooms, and upgradation in syllabus.
reviews.review_text:
Library is so good and classroom's AC won't work. No Wi-Fi is available.
The quality of the food is so good and they are well-focused on sports and events and if you like extra activities you can choose this college it well suits you but for knowledge, it's not the right one for the future.

reviews.review_heading: A proper college to gain knowledge in aeronautics and aerospace for a career.
reviews.review_text: The college has good architecture and infrastructure design. Students have various hangout spots to relax. The college has good hostel facilities, including AC and non-AC, providing hygienic food for North Indian and South Indian students. Good medical facilities are also provided in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Life at HITS - Can survive and excel when you have an interest to be motivated and ask doubts.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are okay in Hindustan. Library is very good and well-maintained. It has 5 floors and air-conditioned. I didn't opt for hostel but still some of my friends said it was average. There is 1 main canteen and some small snacks and ice-cream shops are available.

reviews.review_heading: Life in Hindustan, everything u need to know from an hindustaninan.
reviews.review_text: So facilities are good in Hindustan like we have so many labs like aerodynamics lab, propulsion system lab and computer labs and only hostellers are provided with Wi-Fi and in hostels even though the fee is a bit high it is good and the food is good too .

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the curriculum but need more placements in relevant fields.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities were good. It contained aircraft hanger, fight simulator, chetak helicopter, learjet aircraft, wind tunnels, etc. Different varieties of hostels were provided based on our requirements and comfort. Sports and games were available too. We could go for horse riding as well.

reviews.review_heading: I am a little dissatisfied because of placement and, moreover, good infrastructure and faculties.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and peaceful environment. Students are friendly, and good laboratory facilities are available. Many play areas are available for students. They give space for sports too. Good and neat environment. Good food and hostel feel good because of caring and cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good campus and worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) provides excellent infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library. Hostels offer modern amenities and 24/7 medical services. The campus has a hygienic mess, a canteen, and sports facilities for various outdoor and indoor games.

college_info.college_name: HITS Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers both need-based and merit-based scholarships to the eligible students. Also, Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science has instituted Hindustan Teaching Research Fellowships (HTRF) for eligible candidates.
Below are the major highlights of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science scholarships:

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science provides a total of 7 scholarships to eligible students. Below mentioned are the detailed information regarding Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science scholarships:
DRDO Scholarship Scheme for Girls

This scholarship is for Girls / Women students studying in first year of Under Graduate (BE/B.TECH: full time four year degree) and Post Graduate (M.TECH/ME: two year full time degree course) under “DRDO Scholarship Scheme for Girls in Aerospace Engg / Aeronautical Engg / Space Engg & Rocketry / Avionics / Aircraft Engg”.
Covid Martyrs Scholarships

This scholarship is for wards of COVID Martyrs, who have lost their lives protecting our countrymen during the COVID Pandemic will be given complete Tuition Fee waiver in the discipline of their choice, having met the basic laid down norms, such as marks in qualifying exams etc. Also all the expenses of the student which include traveling, boarding and lodging will be taken care of by HITS. Also, a monthly stipend is provided during the period of the course.
Covid Frontline Warrior Scholarship

This scholarship is for the wards of Doctors, Healthcare professionals, Government and Service personnel those who have participated in protecting our countrymen during the COVID Pandemic. The scholarship is for a period of two years across all courses to those who meet the basic scholarship criteria.
Dr KCG Verghese Merit Cum Means Scholarship

This scholarship is offered to the top scorers in Class 12 from any School, Boards, Subjects, Centum Scorers, Class Toppers at HITS, Batch Toppers, and UG Rank Holders and Proficiency Prize holders are awarded scholarship to pursue their higher studies at HITS. Scholarships are also awarded to the meritorious students who are financially weak to meet their educational needs at HITS.
Dr Elizabeth Verghese Founder Chancellor Scholarship

This scholarship is offered to the girls with academic potential to pursue higher education and who are from lower income families and are interested in pursuing higher education at HITS are eligible for this scholarship.
Hindusthan Loyality Scholarship
This scholarship is subject to norms and the scrutiny of the Scholarship Committee. It is offered to:
Sports Scholarship

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers this scholarship to the students who excel in sports. The student who has performed and achieved at the National, State and Inter-University Levels in the following sports are eligible.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The worst college dissatisfy.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students are placed. The average salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA to 20 LPA. Recruiting companies are Cipla, Makind, Abbott, etc. Around 60% of students get placed by Abbott, Mankind, and Cipla. Other students do not get placements because they get frustrated with this college. Because the college does not give the hope and experience that students want, they do not motivate them and they treat them only for fees.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are there along with lab and infrastructure. But library is very cheap and third class. There are no seats and books in it. Also mess food is very dirty. Bed of hostel is not clean and bathroom is very dirty. The hostel boys are in trouble many times with this college. Because the college does not order the hostel guard to take specific care of cleaning and mess food. Hostel is connected to the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: SSUTMS, Bhopal Review by Prajwal Pawar.

review_content.Placements: I completed my graduation in B.Sc. CS from this college in the year 2019. Talking about the placements of this college, no one from my batch got placed as this college didn't offer placements for B.Sc. or B.Com graduates. However, if you are doing B.E. or B.Tech from this college, you can get some decent placements. The highest package offered by companies was 11 LPA, and the average package was 2.5 LPA. Some of the companies that come here for recruiting are TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. No internship was offered to us by the college.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2024.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest was 1 LPA, and the average was 2.5 LPA. Companies like Cipla, Mankind, etc. Many companies gave placements to students from lower college students, and the highest placement was given to M Pharmacy students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available were good management. Classrooms were very good, and the library was amazing, having all the course books available. There were no sports or games in the lower college. The mess and canteen had outstanding quality food, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The faculty is great, but students are not as much as the campus provides.

content.Placements: There is no such news of placement in SSSUTMS. During my 2 years of college, I haven't heard about any placement in my Aeronautical department. Otherwise, there might be placements that might have happened in the computer science department. Once, there was a notice issue about an industrial visit, but it never happened.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at SSSUTMS is average. Students do not have university emails, nor is Wi-Fi provided for them. Wi-Fi is only available for staff. There is Wi-Fi by Jio, but it has limited data. The computer labs on campus are sufficient for teaching and are in an okay state. The library has all the books required in the curriculum, and you can also find extra reference books. The hostel is somewhat poor. I do not stay in the hostel, but my friends say the food is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The worst college dissatisfy.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students are placed. The average salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA to 20 LPA. Recruiting companies are Cipla, Makind, Abbott, etc. Around 60% of students get placed by Abbott, Mankind, and Cipla. Other students do not get placements because they get frustrated with this college. Because the college does not give the hope and experience that students want, they do not motivate them and they treat them only for fees.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are there along with lab and infrastructure. But library is very cheap and third class. There are no seats and books in it. Also mess food is very dirty. Bed of hostel is not clean and bathroom is very dirty. The hostel boys are in trouble many times with this college. Because the college does not order the hostel guard to take specific care of cleaning and mess food. Hostel is connected to the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: SSUTMS, Bhopal Review by Prajwal Pawar.

content.Placements: I completed my graduation in B.Sc. CS from this college in the year 2019. Talking about the placements of this college, no one from my batch got placed as this college didn't offer placements for B.Sc. or B.Com graduates. However, if you are doing B.E. or B.Tech from this college, you can get some decent placements. The highest package offered by companies was 11 LPA, and the average package was 2.5 LPA. Some of the companies that come here for recruiting are TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. No internship was offered to us by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied.

content.Placements: Our college has no placements; not a single company visited. According to previous records, the staff says the average package was 10 LPA, but there was not a single placement in my session.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and a green environment. I cannot say much about the hostel because I did not live there. Canteen food was good, but there is no playground for sports activities.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful. They have a very old course curriculum, and the university does not update it. The passing percentage is good, but I do not know how students pass because the teachers are not interested in teaching.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by SSSUTMS for admission to B.A.M.S.?
faqs.answer: The main entrance exam accepted is the *NEET*, which stands for National Eligibility cum Entrance Test for the admission to the B.A.M.S. programme in SSSUTMS. It is a common entrance conducted by National Testing Agency across India for B.A.M.S. programs in the private and government institutions in the country.A qualifying score in NEET is required for admission since it is a statutory requirement for medical and allied health Science courses. Then, the admission is based on counseling and cutoffs as per the NEET score and availability of seats.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available were good management. Classrooms were very good, and the library was amazing, having all the course books available. There were no sports or games in the lower college. The mess and canteen had outstanding quality food, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is great, but students are not as much as the campus provides.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at SSSUTMS is average. Students do not have university emails, nor is Wi-Fi provided for them. Wi-Fi is only available for staff. There is Wi-Fi by Jio, but it has limited data. The computer labs on campus are sufficient for teaching and are in an okay state. The library has all the books required in the curriculum, and you can also find extra reference books. The hostel is somewhat poor. I do not stay in the hostel, but my friends say the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college dissatisfy.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are there along with lab and infrastructure. But library is very cheap and third class. There are no seats and books in it. Also mess food is very dirty. Bed of hostel is not clean and bathroom is very dirty. The hostel boys are in trouble many times with this college. Because the college does not order the hostel guard to take specific care of cleaning and mess food. Hostel is connected to the college.

reviews.review_heading: SSUTMS, Bhopal Review by Prajwal Pawar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department was decent; it was vast and the environment was also quite decent. There were all kinds of labs like the computer lab, chemistry lab, and others. Talking about the hostel facility, it was also decent, and the quality of food was acceptable. There were separate girls' and boys' hostels in this college, and the fee was around 12,000 for a year.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and a green environment. I cannot say much about the hostel because I did not live there. Canteen food was good, but there is no playground for sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good and the hostel is great. We had to go to the labs and library every day which was a good experience. The hostel was very comfortable and all the students had a great time. The sports days were especially memorable.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The course was very good. Facilities and infrastructure were good in the pharmacy department. Wi-Fi facility was available. Classrooms were the best and a useful library was available. Canteen food was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college plays a vital role in the development as the students were now focusing on the laboratories, classrooms, etc., while selecting a college. Computing resources were one of the important and mandatory needs of this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good infrastructure, staff, teachers, canteen and playground.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. They also provide good quality facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, hostels, mess, canteen, medical, and playground. Our college also organises many sports events, quiz types competitions and many entertaining occasions.

reviews.review_heading: There are good faculty members in this college.
reviews.review_text: Both boys and girls hostels are available in our college. Our college also has public Wi-Fi facility and all subjects labs. A hospital is available for medical facilities, and games and sports are organised here. Apart from this, many faculty members from outside the college visit our college for expert lectures.

reviews.review_heading: Stay away unless you don't love your career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is of top-class undoubtedly. But there is no benefit of having a good infrastructure if college is not offering quality education. There are good labs and classrooms, but they are of no use if they are not providing quality education. Stay away from this college.

reviews.review_heading: Never choose for engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are several buildings, and there is a space for games like football and cricket. They have huge infrastructure and a lot of open spaces for playground and canteen. It's close to Pachama railway station and further connected to Sehore-Bhopal road. The infrastructure is in good condition, and it has an awesome location, and it is a cool place.

reviews.review_heading: Good management and also pharmacy departments are good.
reviews.review_text: Good in infrastructure but amenities cleanliness are not up to date. Higher tier grasses are grown in the garden areas. Water is not available in the summer due to this classes of hostel student are mostly absent. The college management is not working for the student but working for their self.

reviews.review_heading: An infrastructure oriented college with generous faculty.
reviews.review_text: This college is only concentrating on its infrastructure, but not on the environment-friendly infrastructure. It just contains the buildings. They do not have a good canteen although remaining things are nice and infrastructure is also fine.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is world-class. Classrooms would be empty after 1st semester due to the unavailability of faculty members. The hostel facility is available. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are not applicable, and you would not get any help here if you like sports. Labs are not available.

reviews_list.review_title: KMCT Medical College is an excellent option for budding doctors.

review_content.Placements: So at KMCT Medical College, the placement is based on all India and state-wise ranks in NEET. We have an internship at the house surgeony period, and there is a stipend along with it. NRI package is 25 lacs per annum and merit is 9 lacs per annum, and there are reservation seats for OEC, SC, and ST.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good, and the mess food is acceptable, but the sports side is kind of weak, mainly for me because I'm a cricket player, and here there's no college ground. The hospital and college infrastructures are good, and there are around 1000+ beds in the hospital, including the super specialty hospital also.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best medical colleges in Kerala.

review_content.Placements: So it's a medical college, and the placement is based on NEET rankings, and the packages are for merit and NRI students. The merit package is 9 lacs per annum, and the NRI package is 25 lacs per annum. There are schemes available for reservation students of OEC, SC, and ST sections.
review_content.Infrastructure: KMCT has good infrastructure both for the lectures and the practical, which is done in both labs and hospitals. Clinics start from second year onwards, and there's a wide range of opportunities for us to study from the doctors themselves. There are Wi-Fi connections available on the campus and in the libraries.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: First NAAC-accredited private medical college that is student-friendly.

content.Placements: In 2025, placement was about 93 per cent. The average package is about Rs. 7,50,000 per annum. Most of them got placed in nearby private hospitals, and many opted for higher education. Many cracked Indian and international exams. This course helps you to be a professional medical undergraduate.
content.Infrastructure: As our college has its NAAC accreditation, classrooms are very nice and comfortable, and it has centralised air conditioning and projector technologies for classes. The library is also too authentic with 1000s of books written by great clinicians and other medical professors.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Guarantee a fruitful college experience.

content.Placements: My batch currently has 150 students, but the newer 2024 batch has started with 250 students, which is such a great accomplishment for the college, seeing the improvement in teaching facilities and infrastructure that the college has gone through. After passing out, students get placements in top hospitals in the city.
content.Infrastructure: First-year to third-year students receive separate classrooms and lab facilities in the college itself, whereas for the final years, the lecture hall is situated in the hospital. A separate reading room is available for the students with Wi-Fi, and a spacious two-floored library is available with numerous books on different categories. Hostels are pretty good. Three students are placed in each room, and depending on the hostel, there are attached bathrooms as well as common bathrooms for a single floor. The college also provides washing machines for each hostel.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: KMCT Medical College is an excellent option for budding doctors.

content.Placements: So at KMCT Medical College, the placement is based on all India and state-wise ranks in NEET. We have an internship at the house surgeony period, and there is a stipend along with it. NRI package is 25 lacs per annum and merit is 9 lacs per annum, and there are reservation seats for OEC, SC, and ST.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good, and the mess food is acceptable, but the sports side is kind of weak, mainly for me because I'm a cricket player, and here there's no college ground. The hospital and college infrastructures are good, and there are around 1000+ beds in the hospital, including the super specialty hospital also.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: One of the best medical colleges in Kerala.

content.Placements: So it's a medical college, and the placement is based on NEET rankings, and the packages are for merit and NRI students. The merit package is 9 lacs per annum, and the NRI package is 25 lacs per annum. There are schemes available for reservation students of OEC, SC, and ST sections.
content.Infrastructure: KMCT has good infrastructure both for the lectures and the practical, which is done in both labs and hospitals. Clinics start from second year onwards, and there's a wide range of opportunities for us to study from the doctors themselves. There are Wi-Fi connections available on the campus and in the libraries.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with college experience and environment around. But some improvement are necessary .

content.Placements: MBBS students don't get placement in any companies after the completion of their course. During the internship, we get a stipend, but it is bare minimum to survive, which should be increased in my opinion. After the internship, most students opt to prepare for post-graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are above average but not something extraordinary. Each department has its own lab and lab equipment. Classrooms are spacious and well accommodated. The library spans two levels with standard textbooks and enough space for students to enjoy reading time. Sports and games need to be uplifted.

reviews.review_heading: First NAAC-accredited private medical college that is student-friendly.
reviews.review_text: As our college has its NAAC accreditation, classrooms are very nice and comfortable, and it has centralised air conditioning and projector technologies for classes. The library is also too authentic with 1000s of books written by great clinicians and other medical professors.

reviews.review_heading: Guarantee a fruitful college experience.
reviews.review_text: First-year to third-year students receive separate classrooms and lab facilities in the college itself, whereas for the final years, the lecture hall is situated in the hospital. A separate reading room is available for the students with Wi-Fi, and a spacious two-floored library is available with numerous books on different categories. Hostels are pretty good. Three students are placed in each room, and depending on the hostel, there are attached bathrooms as well as common bathrooms for a singl...

reviews.review_heading: KMCT Medical College is an excellent option for budding doctors.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, and the mess food is acceptable, but the sports side is kind of weak, mainly for me because I'm a cricket player, and here there's no college ground. The hospital and college infrastructures are good, and there are around 1000+ beds in the hospital, including the super specialty hospital also.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best medical colleges in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: KMCT has good infrastructure both for the lectures and the practical, which is done in both labs and hospitals. Clinics start from second year onwards, and there's a wide range of opportunities for us to study from the doctors themselves. There are Wi-Fi connections available on the campus and in the libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college experience and environment around. But some improvement are necessary .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are above average but not something extraordinary. Each department has its own lab and lab equipment. Classrooms are spacious and well accommodated. The library spans two levels with standard textbooks and enough space for students to enjoy reading time. Sports and games need to be uplifted.

reviews.review_heading: Academics and internship are excellent but sports is mediocre .
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi facility throughout the whole campus. Also, labs and classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned. The mess and canteen are hygienic and provide food as per the request of the student committee. Sports are a bit less compared to other colleges since there is not much ground for practice and all.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, academics, extracurricular, campus environment.
reviews.review_text: Well-oriented library for both study and research purposes, catering to UG, PG, and higher levels. Well-equipped labs are present, and classrooms are advanced with projector screens, Wi-Fi, and comfortable benches and desks. Hostel facilities are above average with good food and accommodation. Sanitation and water quality can be improved. Food in the mess is good. Medical facilities are well-equipped. Sports facilities are good but can be improved.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private college for North Indian medical students in Calicut.
reviews.review_text: We have air-conditioned lecture halls, a library with all new editions of the latest reference books, and national standard laboratories for all different departments like Anatomy, Physiology, etc. The hostel is clean with 3 people sharing per room. Dinner is delivered at the hostel. Lunch and breakfast are served in the college mess. Food is healthy and served in sanitised way. Sports facilities are a badminton court, volleyball court, and basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: The lack of infrastructure and poor management by the college led to a sad life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities offered by the college are below what is the minimum requirement for any other college. There are no gyms, grounds, or even an auditorium. Air conditioning is presented but no one bothers to fix it. The hostel also has several broken showers and the management is not bothered.

reviews.review_heading: I am somewhat satisfied with the hostel but everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good and the management is trying to improve as they are planning to make the college deemed soon. The number of seats will be increased to 250 from 150 in 2022. Hostel rooms are so congested and bathroom facilities are very poor. There are only 3 toilets for 40 boys.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has great faculty and infrastructure but I am dissatisfied with college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. All the departments have their dedicated labs, demonstration rooms, lecture halls, PG rooms, and research labs. Wi-Fi is available but connectivity is limited. Quality food is available but for sports, there is not much scope.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent teaching standards and sports facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have an excellent library facility. Weekly journals of international and Indian standards are available. There are well-equipped labs and classrooms and are air-conditioned. The hostel is average and there are spacious rooms. Food served is way better than other colleges. We have very good sports facilities and daily practices for various sports. Reduction is given to students for medical checkups.

reviews.review_heading: Balanced campus life with strong academics.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with well maintained labs, classrooms and library facilities qith Wi-Fi. The attached hospital provides strong clinical exposure. Hostel rooms are clean with basic amenities and the mess food is decent. The campus facilities support both study and clinical training well. Sports including cricket football and indoor games like badminton are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, studying on this campus is worth it. Campus life is never a problem if you join KMCT.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure for MBBS students. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with audio-visual aids. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the college. Hostels are clean and secure with basic furniture. Food is better compared to other PGs and hostels. Wi-Fi is also available in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and 150+ alumni.
reviews.review_text: The rooms were always clean and well-connected with the wardens. The food was average. The college conducted several games and curricular activities each year. There were good medical facilities in case we were hospitalized. In the evenings, we always played some outdoor games, and the weather was nice.

reviews_list.review_title: I recommend you this college because it has really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: People who scored good marks in NEET were given admissions. There are management quota students who can clear their fees through educational loans, and scholarships are provided for A category. Generally, in medicine, there would be no placements till PG, but many educational events occur where they give certificates which can be useful for them in the USMLE exam. Also, internships are provided for a 1-year duration after 4 years of their MBBS. Interns are paid with a good stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have projector classrooms that are very large, where 200 students can sit. Excellent faculty, spacious labs, and a fully equipped mess and canteen are available. Indoor and outdoor sports are available, and a helipad is present. A big ground is also present.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has good placements, good faculty members, average infrastructure, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: As this is a private medical college, no stipend will be provided for your internship. A lot of clinical knowledge can be gained during the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is the drawback of the college, mainly the boys' hostel. Classrooms are spacious and good. Study halls and a library are even present in the hospital. Every year, sports events are conducted which include football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, and kabadi.
review_content.Faculty: The final year faculty members are too good when compared to other years. In order to complete your MBBS course, you have to pass all the 4-year final exams, a total of 19 subjects. Faculty helps a lot in this process. The pass percentage is almost 90%.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the mess food.

review_content.Placements: It is a private college. I am from the batch of 2015, and it has a total of 200 students. The fee for government quota students is Rs. 60,000 per annum, while for private admission, it is 1.6 lacs per annum. You can access everything related to medicine and learn. About 99% of students completed their internships from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our campus is good with projectors, vast benches for students and interactive classes. There are also CCTV cameras all over the college, and there might be over 400 cameras. There is separate parking for bikes and cars, and our college also has a bus. Hostels are decent, and the food served is fine. There is a separate library and many reading rooms.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences is approximately INR 270000 - INR 2250000.

overview_faqs.question: Is Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences is a renowned institution offering PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences boasts an impressive review rating of 3.75 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.88 for Campus Life, 3.5 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 3.63 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the overall faculty members and resources.

content.Placements: There are 200 and now it is up to 250 students per batch. Roles offered are mostly clinical staff lecturers and seniors. Almost every student gets internships, which helps in building practical communication. It provides skills for clinical work, and we can look forward to major developments.
content.Infrastructure: The college has almost all facilities including libraries and digital class pads, and nice classrooms. There are practical labs and hospitals to enhance our clinical approach. Mess food is kind of set down, so we will have to adjust. For sports and games, we can hope for events, exclusive games, and competitions.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A small and detailed review of our college.

content.Placements: There are 250 students per batch and it's a good college. There is no issue in our college one can opt for it. The fee is little high but it's for government only. MBBS has a mandatory internship and then we need to do a PG for a job. We need to work hard.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average as it is a pretty old college. Our has good facilities like gym, ground, and library. The quality of food is average like other hostels, and doesn't provide a great menu. There is no canteen in the college and no Wi-Fi facility available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I recommend you this college because it has really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: People who scored good marks in NEET were given admissions. There are management quota students who can clear their fees through educational loans, and scholarships are provided for A category. Generally, in medicine, there would be no placements till PG, but many educational events occur where they give certificates which can be useful for them in the USMLE exam. Also, internships are provided for a 1-year duration after 4 years of their MBBS. Interns are paid with a good stipend.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have projector classrooms that are very large, where 200 students can sit. Excellent faculty, spacious labs, and a fully equipped mess and canteen are available. Indoor and outdoor sports are available, and a helipad is present. A big ground is also present.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has good placements, good faculty members, average infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: As this is a private medical college, no stipend will be provided for your internship. A lot of clinical knowledge can be gained during the internship.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is the drawback of the college, mainly the boys' hostel. Classrooms are spacious and good. Study halls and a library are even present in the hospital. Every year, sports events are conducted which include football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, and kabadi.
content.Faculty: The final year faculty members are too good when compared to other years. In order to complete your MBBS course, you have to pass all the 4-year final exams, a total of 19 subjects. Faculty helps a lot in this process. The pass percentage is almost 90%.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the mess food.

content.Placements: It is a private college. I am from the batch of 2015, and it has a total of 200 students. The fee for government quota students is Rs. 60,000 per annum, while for private admission, it is 1.6 lacs per annum. You can access everything related to medicine and learn. About 99% of students completed their internships from our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our campus is good with projectors, vast benches for students and interactive classes. There are also CCTV cameras all over the college, and there might be over 400 cameras. There is separate parking for bikes and cars, and our college also has a bus. Hostels are decent, and the food served is fine. There is a separate library and many reading rooms.

admission_process.title: Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences.Prathima Institute of Medical Sciencesadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET, NEET PG, and Telangana NEET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,70,000 - 22,50,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 66 months.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Madras Veterinary College - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

placements.overview: PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 46 students were admitted at Madras Veterinary College - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University and 46 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 46 students 28 were placed with median salary of INR 720000 and 18 students opted for higher studies.

faqs.answer: A:    Madras Veterinary College - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 5.4 LPA to BVSC students.

faqs.answer: A:    Dairy Technologist, Dairy Nutritionist, Farm Manager, Microbiologist, Dairy Scientist, etc., are some top job profiles you can opt from, once you complete a Dairy Science course in India. The average salary of a Farm Manager in India is INR 7.2 LPA.
faqs.question: Which is the top job profile in Dairy Science industry?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Madras Veterinary College - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Science. College offers BVSC courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Sc., PG Diploma and MVSC. The Madras Veterinary College - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University course fee ranges between INR 10,000 to 44,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good veterinary college in the heart of Chennai City.

review_content.Placements: As far as the veterinary sector is concerned, it is very rare to get companies for campus recruitment. But MVC and TANUVAS faculty try to get pharmaceutical, poultry, dairy, and animal welfare companies for campus recruitment every year. The veterinary sector has a wide variety of options for placement. The campus offers help for scholarships in both UG and PG levels. For freshers, the highest package was 50k.
review_content.Infrastructure: Madras Veterinary College, Chennai has one of Asia's biggest veterinary libraries. The campus has Wi-Fi, a canteen, and a cooperative store. Every department has a well-furnished laboratory and classroom. The campus was built in the 1800s, and the architecture from the colonial times is still well preserved. Madras Veterinary College Hostel is average. Rooms are small. Hostel food is Tamil cuisine. Food is fine. Hostel rent is reasonable. The hostel has a basketball court, badminton court, table tennis, gym, etc. The hostel offers UPSC training.

individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with its infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 150 students are placed in our batch. The highest salary package offered is 22 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 13.2 LPA. Recruitment can occur in any hospital as a junior resident of a department or any facility as an assistant. All students recruiting for the course have the compulsion to do internships in the course.
content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure are not good as the library does not provide a book issuing facility. Wi-Fi is not enabled anywhere. Classrooms, laboratories, and demonstration rooms are poorly ventilated. Hostels are least facilitated with basic needs only, and power cuts are more often.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It's the best medical college in Udaipur and rajasamand for studies.

content.Placements: I am doing MBBS and there is no placement-like thing in it but yes you can do an internship or practice on your own in any hospital or medical college after completing the MBBS. As it provides the degree of RUHS and it's a government degree that is credible all across the globe. So a job is a very easy thing you can say.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi in the hostel but that's not good. Labs are there in every department and yess they fit perfectly for the requirement but the standard is not that high. Food in mess is not that good but edible. The canteen and cafeteria are there on the campus. It is a medical college so medical facilities are not a point of concern. There is a good atmosphere for sports on the campus. There is a cricket ground, basketball court, badminton court, and volleyball court of the required demands in the campus and we have the "best cricket ground" compared to any other medical college in Rajasthan.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has well-qualified teachers.

reviews.review_heading: I will rate our college with 7 stars out of 10 stars.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is available in our college, and it has Wi-Fi. But Wi-Fi is not available in college, and there is every lab on our campus. The library is available on the campus, and it has all books. The quality of facilities provided in our hostel is moderate, and the quality of food served is average. All sports grounds are available. Our college environment is peaceful, and the weather is very interesting around the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the dedicated and extremely helpful staff members and management.
reviews.review_text: The college provides labs for every subject like physiology, microbiology, pathology, PSM, forensic, medicine, etc. The hostel has Wi-Fi. There is a huge ground for volleyball, cricket and football, and there is also a badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members in our college are hardworking and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Some part of the infrastructure in our college is under development, but the developed infrastructure is adorable. In the hostels, the rooms are spacious. There are 5 lecture theatres in college. Wi-Fi facility is available in both hostels and college for students and staff members.

reviews.review_heading: Very much renowned degree of RUHS beautiful environment, highly professional faculty.

Build-up is going on and the campus has a great playground, beautiful groups of small gardens on the entrance which are really heartwarming and pleasant. Classrooms are facilitated with AC and projectors. A big library containing all the medical books written by different authors.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college .

table.details: Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital

college_info.intro:
Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College Sangli offers BDS and MDS as its popular programmes. The College offers it based on the eligibility of merit and entrance. Candidates applying for the either must have completed 17 years of age. For admission to BDS, the General category (UR) candidates must qualify NEET with a minimum of 50 percentile and qualify as per the DCI norms. However, for the Backward classes (SC/ST), a minimum of 40 percentile is necessary to be secured in NEET. Additionally, for MDS, candidates must have passed the BDS examination from any Dental College recognised by the Dental Council of India. The College offers these courses for a fee ranging between INR 15.8 Lakh to INR 40.95 Lakh.
For more information about Dental College and Hospital, Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth check out the below video:

paragraphs: BVDC Sangli admissionsare entrance-based. The college offers admission to BDS and MDS courses based on NEET and NEET MDS scores, respectively.BVDC Sanglia constitutent unit ofBharatI VidyapeethDeemed-to-be-University. The college offers BDS and MDS courses approved by the Dental Council of India and MOHFW (Ministry of Health and Family Welfare). Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

Candidates need to qualify entrance exam specific to their course for admission. The college accepts NEET and NEET MDS for respective courses. Below areBVDC Sangli coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

BVDC admission process includes registration, selection, merit list and counselling. Candidates need to apply for the entrance exam accepted for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in BVDC Sangli:
STEP 1: BVDC Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria need to apply for NEET for BDS admission. Aspirants have to fill out the NEET MDS application form for MDS course. Further, candidates may need to fill out the admission form on the college website.
STEP 2: Selection

BVDC selects candidates for BDS based on their NEET score. Candidates must also fulfil the eligibility criteria for admission. For MDS, the selection is based on NEET MDS score. Aspirants must secure at least 50% aggregate in the exam (40% for SC/ ST).
STEP 3: Counselling and Admission Confirmation

Aspirants need to participate in the institute-level counselling. Aspirants need to bring the specified documents for verification. Selected candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

placement_data.title: Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 5-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.42 LPA and INR 6.39 LPA , respectively. Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 is released. According to the report, 19 BDS and 17 MDS students were placed during BVDU Dental College and Hospital placements 2022. The median package offered to BDS and MDS students during the BVDU Dental College and Hospital placements 2022 was INR 1.25 LPA and INR 6.25 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: How are BDS placements at Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital- Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth?
faqs.answer: Placements are average depending on individual capabilities and skills. The placement rate recorded during Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College Sangli BDS placements 2021 was 77%. Earlier, the placement rate recorded during Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College Sangli BDS placements in 2020 and 2019 was 84% and 79%, respectively.

faqs.question: Which branch is the best in BDS from Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital- Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth?
faqs.answer: The first-rate branch in BDS from Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital- Sangli, Bharati Vidyapeeth is the one that great suits your hobbies and profession goals. All of the branches offered by means of the college are nicely-regarded and offer notable education and opportunities for graduates. Here is a brief review of each department: General Dentistry: This is the most common branch of BDS and prepares college students for a trendy exercise profession in dentistry. Orthodontics: This department makes a speciality of the correction of crooked or misaligned tooth. Orthodontists use braces, retainers, and different appliances to straighten enamel and improve the patient's smile. Periodontology: This department focuses on the gums and supporting structures of the teeth. Periodontists diagnose and deal with gum disorder, which can result in tooth loss. Prosthodontics: This department specializes in the substitute of lacking enamel with artificial tooth. Prosthodontists can create crowns, bridges, dentures, and different dental appliances. Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery: This department focuses on the surgical remedy of the mouth, jaws, and face. Oral and maxillofacial surgeons can perform a huge range of processes, which includes extractions, implants, and facial reconstruction.

highlights.summary: University of Science and Technology Meghalaya admissions 2026 are open for Diploma, UG and PG courses. Interested candidates can apply for their desired course by visiting the official university's website. A few more updates are as follows:

college_info.intro: The University of Science and Technology Meghalaya offers BTech and MBA as its flagship courses. BTech is provided through the Department of Engineering and Technology for the duration of 4 years. The BTech course is offered in 6 specialisations, namely Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Computer Science Engineering. Whereas, MBA is provided through the Department of Business Administration in full-time mode for the duration of 2 years. The MBA course is offered in 5 specialisations, namely Sales and Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, Entrepreneurship, and Agriculture and Food Business. Admission to these courses is based on entrance and merit scores. Candidates can take a look below at the University of Science and Technology Meghalaya popular courses:

Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

The fees for various courses may vary based on the type and level of the program. To get into USTM Shillong, candidates must appear for the entrance exams. faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

faqs.answer: A:    USTM offers BSc in seven specialisation Chemistry, Physics, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Food Science & Technology, Botany and Zoology. As per the University admission procedure admission to all the UG and PG courses are Merit basis. Candidates seeking to get admisison in BSc don't have to write an entrance exam butr they are required to fulfill the eligibilty criteria i.e. class 12 with minimum 45%.
faqs.question: Is there an entrance exam for BSc in USTM?

faqs.answer: A:    The department of Business Administration, USTM offers two years full time MBA (approved by AICTE) programme. Admission to MBA programme done on basis of entrnace exams followed by a Personal Interview (PI) & Group Discussion (GD) at the university campus. The entrance exam for MBA is optional like candiates can appear for CAT/MAT/XMAT or they can write the university based entrance exam USTM-CAT. Candidates having valid scorecards of CAT/MAT/XMAT etc. will be exempted from USTM-CAT and such candidates may directly appear for PI & GD. The final merit list for admission in MBA will be prepared considering the percentage of marks in the qualifying examination, score of USTM-CAT/MAT/CAT/XMAT and marks obtained in PI & GD.
faqs.question: Is CAT required for MBA in USTM?

reviews_list.batch_info: LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The environment was good, and faculty was very helpful.

review_content.Placements: After completing the 4th semester in law, students could apply for placements provided by the placement cell. It was based on the best performance of students in their academic roles, internships, and other curricular activities. The placement cell in the college had visits from companies like Wipro, Infosys, and USB. Around 60% of students got placed after completing the course. Litigation was my career plan after this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The room facilities were good. There were 3 bed students in one room. The rooms were big and comfortable for 3 students. The meals were good. Every morning, they gave us fried rice, puri sabji, khichdi, egg curry, roti, etc. For lunch, there was dal and bhaji with chutney, and for dinner, roti or rice with chicken, paneer, fish, egg curry, etc. The hostel was on the university campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This university has a very clean and green campus.

review_content.Placements: Most of my class is doing placements in chemical companies. I think the package is between 2-4 LPA. About 20% of students are doing internships. In Chemistry M.Sc., students are mainly getting offers from chemical companies and other institutions like junior colleges and colleges from guest professors.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, delicious food is provided, and the lodging facilities are very good. You can choose a single room or a double room depending on your budget because it's a private university. Wi-Fi is available for use, and the hostel offers complete freedom.

overview_faqs.question: Is USTM a recognised university?
overview_faqs.answer: The University of Science and Technology, Meghalaya (USTM) is the first state private University in the field of Science and Technology in entire north-east India. It was established in 2008 and is sponsored by the Education Research and Development Foundation (ERDF), Guwahati. The University is approved by UGC and AICTE. It offers more than 60 courses at UG, PG and PhD level, through its seven schools and 19 departments of multiple streams. USTM has also received the necessary approval from AICTE, New Delhi; NCTE, ERC, Bhubaneswar, Pharmacy Council of India, BCI, New Delhi to run MBA, B.Ed., D. Pharm & B. Pharm, LLB (H) and BALLB (H) programmes respectively.

review_summary.college_name: University of Science and Technology Meghalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It has good faculty and nice infrastructure. There is no good placement rate.

content.Placements: Placements are not that good. One of the students from the senior batch got placed with a package of 1.3 LPA. The placement rate is low. Companies also recruit students from abroad. If a student studies hard, then placements are not that tough.
content.Infrastructure: The equipment required for our practical is present. Honestly, some of the equipment is not in good working condition. I am staying in an off-campus hostel, so the infrastructure is good, but Wi-Fi is not available right now. However, it is mentioned in the college prospectus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Really good quality of teaching and the best infrastructure.

content.Placements: 75% of students got placed. The highest package is 35 LPA, and the lowest is 10 LPA. This is best for a student at Tata and Infosys. 80% of students who complete this course from this university got internships. It offers a vast array of opportunities, like forest rangers and many more forest officials.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, AC, and departmental library available. Food is average, games and sports are top-notch. Hostel facilities are above average, and the guidelines and guidance are top-level. I am eager to tell my juniors to come to this college and take their friends with them.

individual_reviews.course: LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The environment was good, and faculty was very helpful.

content.Placements: After completing the 4th semester in law, students could apply for placements provided by the placement cell. It was based on the best performance of students in their academic roles, internships, and other curricular activities. The placement cell in the college had visits from companies like Wipro, Infosys, and USB. Around 60% of students got placed after completing the course. Litigation was my career plan after this course.
content.Infrastructure: The room facilities were good. There were 3 bed students in one room. The rooms were big and comfortable for 3 students. The meals were good. Every morning, they gave us fried rice, puri sabji, khichdi, egg curry, roti, etc. For lunch, there was dal and bhaji with chutney, and for dinner, roti or rice with chicken, paneer, fish, egg curry, etc. The hostel was on the university campus.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This university has a very clean and green campus.

content.Placements: Most of my class is doing placements in chemical companies. I think the package is between 2-4 LPA. About 20% of students are doing internships. In Chemistry M.Sc., students are mainly getting offers from chemical companies and other institutions like junior colleges and colleges from guest professors.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, delicious food is provided, and the lodging facilities are very good. You can choose a single room or a double room depending on your budget because it's a private university. Wi-Fi is available for use, and the hostel offers complete freedom.

individual_reviews.course: LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My review of this college.

content.Placements: The institution offers a high package of placements to the final year students. Internships are also there in order to help students learn the implementation of their knowledge. Many reputed legal firms and companies hire students. The placement in this college is amazing. The salary package given to the students in the university is 5-7 LPA. There is a 100% placement in this university. The highest package offered is 20 LPA with 100% placements. Roles like legal counsel are offered in law firms and companies such as Deutsche Bank, Luthra, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The course curriculum is very well designed and keeps getting changed every now and then for more efficiency. There are five subjects in every semester, and each subject is very interesting and crucial for interpreting all the larger topics. The hostel facility is good, but a little overpriced. We have 3 blocks each for boys and girls. A common room has board games, table tennis, football, TV, etc. The mess serves good and hygienic food. The students and teachers living in residence have the same food, so the food quality is kept in check.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
