reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, AC, and departmental library available. Food is average, games and sports are top-notch. Hostel facilities are above average, and the guidelines and guidance are top-level. I am eager to tell my juniors to come to this college and take their friends with them.

reviews.review_heading: The environment was good, and faculty was very helpful.
reviews.review_text: The room facilities were good. There were 3 bed students in one room. The rooms were big and comfortable for 3 students. The meals were good. Every morning, they gave us fried rice, puri sabji, khichdi, egg curry, roti, etc. For lunch, there was dal and bhaji with chutney, and for dinner, roti or rice with chicken, paneer, fish, egg curry, etc. The hostel was on the university campus.

reviews.review_heading: This university has a very clean and green campus.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, delicious food is provided, and the lodging facilities are very good. You can choose a single room or a double room depending on your budget because it's a private university. Wi-Fi is available for use, and the hostel offers complete freedom.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum is very well designed and keeps getting changed every now and then for more efficiency. There are five subjects in every semester, and each subject is very interesting and crucial for interpreting all the larger topics. The hostel facility is good, but a little overpriced. We have 3 blocks each for boys and girls. A common room has board games, table tennis, football, TV, etc. The mess serves good and hygienic food. The students and teachers living in residence have the sam...

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: There is a university hostel for both boys and girls on the university campus. The hostel fee for a 3-seater is 6500 Rs per student for both boys’ and girls’ hostels. Non-veg is provided 4 days a week during dinner. A student staying outside spends only about 4000-5000 Rs per month, which allows them to save some money to buy things or spend elsewhere.

reviews.review_heading: The honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities at the college make you feel at home, which is why I refer to it as a home away from home. It is comfortable, clean, and affordable, costing $6,840 for a student to use the hostel facility for a year. The course curriculum is somewhat outdated, but professors introduce many new topics for discussion. The pedagogy also feels a bit traditional, especially considering that many other MBA institutes have adopted innovative teaching styles. Some courses are offered at specific c...

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided by the hostel were good. The campus of the hostel was very secure and safe. Accommodation in the hostel was based on a first come first served basis. There were separate hostels for both boys and girls. Hostel provided many facilities like free internet facility. The college had an environment of studies as well as extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was fully furnished with titles and attached bathroom for 2 people. It provided 24X7 electricity and water. The food we got was healthy and good for our health. There was also a gym. It was located near the university campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University of Science and Technology, Meghalaya.
reviews.review_text: The curriculum of this course revolves around all the major aspects of literature. The curriculum is wholesome and collected therefore, it provides a complete knowledge about the same. The examination structure too is well defined. Hostels and mess both are in very good condition, well maintained, neat and clean and also serve very tasty and healthy food for students feels are very reasonable even a middle-class student can afford very easily and students belonging lower class families can also ...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Accommodation in the hostel was based on a first come first served basis. There were separate hostels for both boys and girls. Hostel provided many facilities like free internet facility,  24-hour water supply, hot water facility, refrigerator, washing machines, dispensary, etc. The hostel appoints a warden who takes care of all the students and looks over all the amenities.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided by the hostel are good. The campus of the hostel is very secure and safe. Accommodation in the hostel is based on a first come first served basis. There are separate hostels for both boys and girls. The hostel provides many facilities like a free internet facility, 24-hour water supply, hot water facility, refrigerator, washing machines, dispensary, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very good and have all the latest facilities. The average rent for UG students is Rs. 5,000 for 2 months, and for PG students it is Rs. 9,000 for 2 months. There are no problems at all. The food in the mess is also very good, with breakfast in the morning. So there is no need to go for searching the food outside.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University of Science and Technology, Meghalaya.
reviews.review_text: The prime location of the college helps a student to find various accommodation options and one of these is the college hostel facility whose cost is 6,840 per student per year. In my opinion, the hostels are comfortable and safe. The learning was according to the rules and guidelines provided by UGC. The syllabus is very modern and we are given different labs as well as departmental and central library. We were also taken on industrial visits and for our practical, external comes from reputed u...

reviews.review_heading: Good college for MBA in Meghalaya.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college was awesome. Wi-Fi was available on all floors and there was also a playground. Hostel facility was also good enough to get amazing food on time. Canteen was nearby our hostel. You could practice for games with your groups also.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied as it is a government medical college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 100% of students are placed. It's a course for 5 years, including internships. After completing the MBBS course offered to their rank, one can prepare for the PG exam for further courses such as MD or MS. They can continue with the MBBS degree but most students take PG exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. The water supply is occasionally disrupted. Our classrooms are good. More than 100 students can be accommodated, as the batch strength is 100 every year. The library and cafeteria are good. The mess food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It has good faculty members, best placements but a below-average infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost all doctors got placed. There are vacancies almost everywhere, maybe in the city or outside the city. The city hospitals are Tata Main Hospital, Jamshedpur, Apex Hospital Jamshedpur, RIMS Ranchi and any large or small health care facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are below average, but teachers exceed expectations. They manage their way out in teaching as they are highly skilled. Food quality is good, but it is not amazing. However, due to ongoing construction, the playground is lost, so there are no sports for a few years.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the fastest and best growing medical colleges.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very impressive. Almost every student who opted for placements got it with a good salary. The average salary offered was somewhat higher than Rs. 60,000 per month. Our seniors got placements in very reputed hospitals, while some opted for higher studies and got very good ranks.

description: MGM Medical College Jamshedpur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

MGM Medical College Jamshedpur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26698 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

MGM Medical College Jamshedpur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26698 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17917 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

MGM Medical College Jamshedpur accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

The hostel building is breaking down. All the walls have cracked. Rooms are not sufficient to accommodate these many students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied as it is a government medical college.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members, best placements but a below-average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are below average, but teachers exceed expectations. They manage their way out in teaching as they are highly skilled. Food quality is good, but it is not amazing. However, due to ongoing construction, the playground is lost, so there are no sports for a few years.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the fastest and best growing medical colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hospital is average here. However, the new hospital complex, which is under construction, will be having top-notch infrastructure and equipment. The new hospital complex will be ready within one to two years. The infrastructure of hostels is good, and the college infrastructure is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in the country.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is moderate in the hospital, but the new hospital complex will be ready in one to two years, and it will have top-notch infrastructure and equipment. Hostels are well maintained and so is the college. The course is also designed very properly.

reviews.review_heading: Our college lacks something, but it provides many good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college, hospital and hostel need improvement according to the current needs of students. Even the college management is working on it, and the development of new infrastructure is in progress at a very fast rate. The new infrastructure would be ready soon.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and I am satisfied with its facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, and the library is well-equipped. Hostel facilities and environment are good enough to survive peacefully. The mess is good, and the quality of food is satisfactory. Our college also provides a Wi-Fi facility. It does not provide sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. It has all the facilities for students to become good a doctor of our society.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides a Wi-Fi facility both in the hostel as well as in college. The library is good. Classrooms are inbuilt with new technology with a fully air-conditioned facility. The hostel provides good facilities, and it is equipped with an RO machine. In the hostel, the studying room is fully air-conditioned, and it is the best place to keep away from distraction and focus on study.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent enough to make good and educated doctors.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on our campus. Our library is one of the best among many medical colleges. The infrastructure of laboratories can be improved. They should be updated with a proper provision of all the chemical and medical equipment. There is a major requirement to improve the cleanliness in the girls' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place, and it provides good facilities for studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is medium to the worst quality. Hostels have the worst quality, and they do have any sports facilities. The food served is adjustable, and hygiene is not maintained. Students themselves control everything, and the warden will not come in front to look at what is happening in the hostel. But it is a good place.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for MBBS course.
reviews.review_text: Some buildings are quite old but are still in good condition. New hostels and hospitals are being constructed near the college. There are huge classrooms and labs available for students. We have a library with a good number of books. Playground for sports and games is available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college, and I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available. Labs are in good condition with all the required lab apparatus and instruments. The classrooms and lecture theatres are in good condition and spacious. The library is very good, spacious and has all kinds of books required for the students. It has an excellent collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college, and it is good.
reviews.review_text: The library is very good here. The hostel and academic facilities are up to the mark. The lodging and residential development are very well. Still, the construction work is in progress in our college which will improve the facilities in our college.
